src/kb/engine.py\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n知识库统一入口：优先 QA 精准匹配 → Text2SQL → RAG 检索生成；RAG 答案展示依据来源与依赖切片。\\\\\\\\n大模型仅使用 DeepSeek（src.llm.get_deepseek_llm），不调用 OpenAI。\\\\\\\\n支持同步 query/query_stream 与异步 aquery_stream，便于高性能并发。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nimport asyncio\\\\\\\\nimport re\\\\\\\\nfrom copy import deepcopy\\\\\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Any, AsyncIterator, List, Optional, Tuple\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom config import get_settings\\\\\\\\nfrom src.llm import get_deepseek_llm\\\\\\\\nfrom .prompt_templates import render_prompt_template_guidance, select_prompt_templates\\\\\\\\nfrom .qa_store import QAStore\\\\\\\\nfrom .text2sql import Text2SQL, Text2SQLConfirmRequired\\\\\\\\nfrom .rag import RAGRetriever, RAGRetrieveResult\\\\\\\\nfrom .retrieval_eval import evaluate_retrieval\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _get_llm():\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"获取 DeepSeek 对话模型（仅此项目允许的大模型，非 OpenAI）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    return get_deepseek_llm(temperature=0.3)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n_RAG_PROMPT = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([\\\\\\\\n    (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"system\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"你是一名海关政策与业务知识助手。你必须严格根据给定的参考片段回答，禁止使用参考内容之外的常识、猜测、补充知识或臆断。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n要求：\\\\\\\\n1. 只能依据参考内容回答；若参考内容不足，请明确说明“根据当前检索结果无法确认”，并建议用户补充问题或转人工。\\\\\\\\n2. 不得编造数字、时间、政策条款、流程、名单、结论。\\\\\\\\n3. 回答采用结构化输出：优先使用“结论：”“依据：”“提示：”这样的结构；简单问题可只保留必要部分。\\\\\\\\n4. 任何事实性结论后都必须附上证据编号，例如 [证据1]、[证据2]；不得写“根据经验”“通常来说”之类无证据表述。\\\\\\\\n5. 简单问题简短答，复杂问题分阶段答（先结论再分点补充）。\\\\\\\\n6. 若收到“重试说明”，表示上一版答案与参考内容关联度不足；你必须更加严格贴合参考内容重新生成。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n    (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"human\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"参考内容：\\\\\\\\n{context}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n用户问题：{question}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n场景化补充要求：\\\\\\\\n{scenario_guidance}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n重试说明：\\\\\\\\n{retry_note}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n请基于参考内容回答：\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n])\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _format_sources(rag_result: RAGRetrieveResult) -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    将 RAG 检索到的 chunks 格式化为「依据来源」展示文案。\\\\\\\\n    若有 parent_content 则展示「背景+片段」，每段截断避免过长；供用户核对答案依据。\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    if not rag_result.chunks:\\\\\\\\n        return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    lines = [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"【依据来源】以下内容来自知识库检索，供您核对：\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n    for i, c in enumerate(rag_result.chunks, 1):\\\\\\\\n        part = (c.parent_content or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip()\\\\\\\\n        if part and part != (c.content or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip():\\\\\\\\n            lines.append(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n--- 证据{i}（背景+片段） ---\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            lines.append(part[:400] + (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"…\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if len(part) &gt; 400 else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\n        content = (c.content or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip()\\\\\\\\n        if content:\\\\\\\\n            lines.append(content[:600] + (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"…\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if len(content) &gt; 600 else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\n    return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(lines)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\nclass KnowledgeQueryTrace:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"记录一次知识库问答的质量追踪信息，供监控与反馈分析使用。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    route: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"knowledge\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    final_status: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    retrieve_attempt: int = 0\\\\\\\\n    top_match_score: float = 0.0\\\\\\\\n    top_normalized_score: float = 0.0\\\\\\\\n    grounding_score: float = 0.0\\\\\\\\n    regenerate_count: int = 0\\\\\\\\n    has_evidence_citations: bool = False\\\\\\\\n    source_count: int = 0\\\\\\\\n    scenario_templates: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\\\\\\\\n    retrieved_doc_ids: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\\\\\\\\n    retrieved_chunk_ids: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\\\\\\\\n    fallback_reason: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    pending_sql: bool = False\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def to_dict(self) -&gt; dict[str, Any]:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"转换为可序列化 dict。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        return {\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"route\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.route,\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"final_status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.final_status,\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"retrieve_attempt\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.retrieve_attempt,\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"top_match_score\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.top_match_score,\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"top_normalized_score\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.top_normalized_score,\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"grounding_score\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.grounding_score,\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"regenerate_count\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.regenerate_count,\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"has_evidence_citations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.has_evidence_citations,\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"source_count\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.source_count,\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"scenario_templates\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": list(self.scenario_templates),\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"retrieved_doc_ids\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": list(self.retrieved_doc_ids),\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"retrieved_chunk_ids\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": list(self.retrieved_chunk_ids),\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"fallback_reason\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.fallback_reason,\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pending_sql\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.pending_sql,\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass KnowledgeEngine:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    知识库问答统一入口：按顺序尝试 QA 精准匹配 → Text2SQL → RAG。\\\\\\\\n    其中 RAG 生成阶段使用的 LLM 仅限 DeepSeek（_get_llm），不调用 OpenAI。\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self):\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"初始化 QA 库、Text2SQL、RAG 检索器及 RAG 用 LLM 链（仅 DeepSeek）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        self.qa = QAStore()\\\\\\\\n        self.text2sql = Text2SQL()\\\\\\\\n        self.rag = RAGRetriever()\\\\\\\\n        self._llm = _get_llm()  # 仅 DeepSeek，禁止 OpenAI\\\\\\\\n        self._rag_chain = _RAG_PROMPT | self._llm\\\\\\\\n        self._last_trace = KnowledgeQueryTrace(final_status=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"init\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _reset_trace(self) -&gt; KnowledgeQueryTrace:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"开始一次新的知识库问答前重置 trace。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        self._last_trace = KnowledgeQueryTrace()\\\\\\\\n        return self._last_trace\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def get_last_trace(self) -&gt; dict[str, Any]:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"返回最近一次 query / aquery / aquery_stream 的追踪信息。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        return deepcopy(self._last_trace.to_dict())\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _build_rag_context(self, rag_result: RAGRetrieveResult) -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"将检索到的父/子块拼成带编号的生成上下文，便于模型引用 [证据N]。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n = (c.content or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip()\\\\\\\\n            if parent and parent != content:\\\\\\\\n                context_parts.append(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"[证据{i}]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n[背景]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n{parent}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n[片段]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n{content}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            else:\\\\\\\\n                context_parts.append(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"[证据{i}]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n{content}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(context_parts)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _normalize_answer_for_eval(self, answer_text: str) -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"去掉结构化标签和证据编号，避免影响答案-文档相关度计算。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        answer = (answer_text or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip()\\\\\\\\n        if not answer:\\\\\\\\n            return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        answer = re.sub(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\[证据\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d+\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", answer)\\\\\\\\n        answer = re.sub(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"(结论|依据|提示)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s*[:：]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", answer)\\\\\\\\n        return answer.strip()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _answer_has_evidence_citations(self, answer_text: str) -&gt; bool:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"除“无法确认”类兜底文案外，答案必须显式带有证据编号。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        answer = (answer_text or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip()\\\\\\\\n        if not answer:\\\\\\\\n            return False\\\\\\\\n        if \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"无法确认\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in answer:\\\\\\\\n            return True\\\\\\\\n        return bool(re.search(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\[证据\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d+\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", answer))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _answer_grounding_score(self, answer_text: str, rag_result: RAGRetrieveResult) -&gt; float:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        计算最终答案与检索文档的最大关联度。\\\\\\\\n        这里把“答案”当作查询，与每个检索块以及整体上下文做匹配；分数低则认为答案可能脱离证据。\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        answer = self._normalize_answer_for_eval(answer_text)\\\\\\\\n        if not answer or not rag_result.chunks:\\\\\\\\n            return 0.0\\\\\\\\n        candidates = []\\\\\\\\n        for c in rag_result.chunks:\\\\\\\\n            text = ((c.parent_content or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip() + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + (c.content or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip()).strip()\\\\\\\\n            if text:\\\\\\\\n                candidates.append(text)\\\\\\\\n        whole_context = self._build_rag_context(rag_result).strip()\\\\\\\\n        if whole_context:\\\\\\\\n            candidates.append(whole_context)\\\\\\\\n        if not candidates:\\\\\\\\n            return 0.0\\\\\\\\n        return max(evaluate_retrieval(answer, text).normalized_score for text in candidates)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _generate_grounded_answer(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        question: str,\\\\\\\\n        rag_result: RAGRetrieveResult,\\\\\\\\n        trace: Optional[KnowledgeQueryTrace] = None,\\\\\\\\n    ) -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        基于检索结果生成最终答案；若答案与检索文档关联度低，则视为可能幻觉并重生成，最多 3 次。\\\\\\\\n        超过最大次数仍不达标时返回保守兜底文案。\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        context = self._build_rag_context(rag_result)\\\\\\\\n        if not context.strip():\\\\\\\\n            if trace is not None:\\\\\\\\n                trace.final_status = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"rag_no_context\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                trace.fallback_reason = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"empty_context\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"未找到相关知识，建议您换个问法或转人工客服。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        settings = get_settings()\\\\\\\\n        min_score = float(getattr(settings, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"rag_answer_grounding_min_score\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", 0.18))\\\\\\\\n        max_times = max(1, int(getattr(settings, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"rag_answer_max_regenerate_times\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", 3)))\\\\\\\\n        selected_templates = select_prompt_templates(question)\\\\\\\\n        scenario_guidance = render_prompt_template_guidance(question)\\\\\\\\n        if trace is not None:\\\\\\\\n            trace.scenario_templates = [item.name for item in selected_templates]\\\\\\\\n        retry_note = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        last_answer = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        last_score = 0.0\\\\\\\\n        for attempt in range(max_times):\\\\\\\\n            try:\\\\\\\\n                resp = self._rag_chain.invoke(\\\\\\\\n                    {\\\\\\\\n                        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"context\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": context,\\\\\\\\n                        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"question\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": question,\\\\\\\\n                        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"scenario_guidance\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": scenario_guidance,\\\\\\\\n                        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"retry_note\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": retry_note,\\\\\\\\n                    }\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n                answer_text = (resp.content or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip()\\\\\\\\n            except Exception:\\\\\\\\n                answer_text = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            if not answer_text:\\\\\\\\n                answer_text = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"根据当前检索结果无法确认，建议您补充问题或转人工客服。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            score = self._answer_grounding_score(answer_text, rag_result)\\\\\\\\n            has_citations = self._answer_has_evidence_citations(answer_text)\\\\\\\\n            last_answer = answer_text\\\\\\\\n            last_score = score\\\\\\\\n            if trace is not None:\\\\\\\\n                trace.grounding_score = score\\\\\\\\n                trace.has_evidence_citations = has_citations\\\\\\\\n                trace.regenerate_count = attempt\\\\\\\\n            if score &gt;= min_score and has_citations:\\\\\\\\n                if trace is not None:\\\\\\\\n                    trace.final_status = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"rag_regenerated\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if attempt &gt; 0 else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"rag_grounded\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                return answer_text\\\\\\\\n            citation_note = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"上一版答案缺少证据编号，请在每个关键结论后补充 [证据N]。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if not has_citations else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            retry_note = (\\\\\\\\n                f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"上一版答案与参考内容关联度过低（score={score:.3f} &lt; {min_score:.3f}），\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"请仅保留能直接从参考内容中得到的事实，删除无法从参考内容明确支持的表述后重新回答。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                + citation_note\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n        if trace is not None:\\\\\\\\n            trace.final_status = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"rag_fallback_unconfirmed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            trace.fallback_reason = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"low_grounding_after_regeneration\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        return (\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"根据当前检索结果无法确认，建议您补充更具体的问题或转人工客服。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            if last_score &lt; min_score\\\\\\\\n            else last_answer\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def query(self, question: str) -&gt; Tuple[str, Optional[str]]:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        依次尝试 QA、Text2SQL、RAG，返回 (回复文案, 待确认 SQL 或 None)。\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":438}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/nanqi/Desktop/常用文件/rag_code_rewritebyai/src/kb/engine.py\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"offset\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"limit\\\\\\\":260},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# src/kb/engine.py\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n知识库统一入口：优先 QA 精准匹配 → Text2SQL → RAG 检索生成；RAG 答案展示依据来源与依赖切片。\\\\\\\\n大模型仅使用 DeepSeek（src.llm.get_deepseek_llm），不调用 OpenAI。\\\\\\\\n支持同步 query/query_stream 与异步 aquery_stream，便于高性能并发。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nimport asyncio\\\\\\\\nimport re\\\\\\\\nfrom copy import deepcopy\\\\\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Any, AsyncIterator, List, Optional, Tuple\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom config import get_settings\\\\\\\\nfrom src.llm import get_deepseek_llm\\\\\\\\nfrom .prompt_templates import render_prompt_template_guidance, select_prompt_templates\\\\\\\\nfrom .qa_store import QAStore\\\\\\\\nfrom .text2sql import Text2SQL, Text2SQLConfirmRequired\\\\\\\\nfrom .rag import RAGRetriever, RAGRetrieveResult\\\\\\\\nfrom .retrieval_eval import evaluate_retrieval\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _get_llm():\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"获取 DeepSeek 对话模型（仅此项目允许的大模型，非 OpenAI）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    return get_deepseek_llm(temperature=0.3)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n_RAG_PROMPT = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([\\\\\\\\n    (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"system\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"你是一名海关政策与业务知识助手。你必须严格根据给定的参考片段回答，禁止使用参考内容之外的常识、猜测、补充知识或臆断。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n要求：\\\\\\\\n1. 只能依据参考内容回答；若参考内容不足，请明确说明“根据当前检索结果无法确认”，并建议用户补充问题或转人工。\\\\\\\\n2. 不得编造数字、时间、政策条款、流程、名单、结论。\\\\\\\\n3. 回答采用结构化输出：优先使用“结论：”“依据：”“提示：”这样的结构；简单问题可只保留必要部分。\\\\\\\\n4. 任何事实性结论后都必须附上证据编号，例如 [证据1]、[证据2]；不得写“根据经验”“通常来说”之类无证据表述。\\\\\\\\n5. 简单问题简短答，复杂问题分阶段答（先结论再分点补充）。\\\\\\\\n6. 若收到“重试说明”，表示上一版答案与参考内容关联度不足；你必须更加严格贴合参考内容重新生成。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n    (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"human\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"参考内容：\\\\\\\\n{context}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n用户问题：{question}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n场景化补充要求：\\\\\\\\n{scenario_guidance}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n重试说明：\\\\\\\\n{retry_note}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n请基于参考内容回答：\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n])\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _format_sources(rag_result: RAGRetrieveResult) -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    将 RAG 检索到的 chunks 格式化为「依据来源」展示文案。\\\\\\\\n    若有 parent_content 则展示「背景+片段」，每段截断避免过长；供用户核对答案依据。\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    if not rag_result.chunks:\\\\\\\\n        return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    lines = [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"【依据来源】以下内容来自知识库检索，供您核对：\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n    for i, c in enumerate(rag_result.chunks, 1):\\\\\\\\n        part = (c.parent_content or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip()\\\\\\\\n        if part and part != (c.content or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip():\\\\\\\\n            lines.append(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n--- 证据{i}（背景+片段） ---\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            lines.append(part[:400] + (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"…\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if len(part) &gt; 400 else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\n        content = (c.content or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip()\\\\\\\\n        if content:\\\\\\\\n            lines.append(content[:600] + (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"…\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if len(content) &gt; 600 else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\n    return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(lines)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\nclass KnowledgeQueryTrace:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"记录一次知识库问答的质量追踪信息，供监控与反馈分析使用。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    route: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"knowledge\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    final_status: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    retrieve_attempt: int = 0\\\\\\\\n    top_match_score: float = 0.0\\\\\\\\n    top_normalized_score: float = 0.0\\\\\\\\n    grounding_score: float = 0.0\\\\\\\\n    regenerate_count: int = 0\\\\\\\\n    has_evidence_citations: bool = False\\\\\\\\n    source_count: int = 0\\\\\\\\n    scenario_templates: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\\\\\\\\n    retrieved_doc_ids: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\\\\\\\\n    retrieved_chunk_ids: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\\\\\\\\n    fallback_reason: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    pending_sql: bool = False\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def to_dict(self) -&gt; dict[str, Any]:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"转换为可序列化 dict。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        return {\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"route\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.route,\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"final_status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.final_status,\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"retrieve_attempt\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.retrieve_attempt,\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"top_match_score\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.top_match_score,\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"top_normalized_score\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.top_normalized_score,\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"grounding_score\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.grounding_score,\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"regenerate_count\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.regenerate_count,\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"has_evidence_citations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.has_evidence_citations,\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"source_count\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.source_count,\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"scenario_templates\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": list(self.scenario_templates),\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"retrieved_doc_ids\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": list(self.retrieved_doc_ids),\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"retrieved_chunk_ids\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": list(self.retrieved_chunk_ids),\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"fallback_reason\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.fallback_reason,\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pending_sql\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.pending_sql,\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass KnowledgeEngine:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    知识库问答统一入口：按顺序尝试 QA 精准匹配 → Text2SQL → RAG。\\\\\\\\n    其中 RAG 生成阶段使用的 LLM 仅限 return self._last_trace\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def get_last_trace(self) -&gt; dict[str, Any]:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"返回最近一次 query / aquery / aquery_stream 的追踪信息。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        return deepcopy(self._last_trace.to_dict())\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _build_rag_context(self, rag_result: RAGRetrieveResult) -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"将检索到的父/子块拼成带编号的生成上下文，便于模型引用 [证据N]。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n context_parts.append(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"[证据{i}]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n[背景]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n{parent}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n[片段]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n{content}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            else:\\\\\\\\n                context_parts.append(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"[证据{i}]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n{content}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(context_parts)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _normalize_answer_for_eval(self, answer_text: str) -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"去掉结构化标签和证据编号，避免影响答案-文档相关度计算。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        answer = (answer_text or re.sub(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\[证据\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d+\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", answer)\\\\\\\\n        answer = re.sub(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"(结论|依据|提示)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s*[:：]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", answer)\\\\\\\\n        return answer.strip()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _answer_has_evidence_citations(self, answer_text: str) -&gt; bool:\\\\\\\\n True\\\\\\\\n        return bool(re.search(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\[证据\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d+\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", answer))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _answer_grounding_score(self, answer_text: str, rag_result: RAGRetrieveResult) -&gt; float:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        计算最终答案与检索文档的最大关联度。\\\\\\\\n not answer or not rag_result.chunks:\\\\\\\\n            return 0.0\\\\\\\\n        candidates = []\\\\\\\\n        for c in rag_result.chunks:\\\\\\\\n            text = ((c.parent_content or candidates)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _generate_grounded_answer(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        question: str,\\\\\\\\n        rag_result: RAGRetrieveResult,\\\\\\\\n        trace: Optional[KnowledgeQueryTrace] = None,\\\\\\\\n    ) -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        基于检索结果生成最终答案；若答案与检索文档关联度低，则视为可能幻觉并重生成，最多 3 次。\\\\\\\\n        超过最大次数仍不达标时返回保守兜底文案。\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        context = self._build_rag_context(rag_result)\\\\\\\\n        if not context.strip():\\\\\\\\n            if trace is not None:\\\\\\\\n                trace.final_status = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"rag_no_context\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                trace.fallback_reason = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"empty_context\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"未找到相关知识，建议您换个问法或转人工客服。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        settings = get_settings()\\\\\\\\n        min_score = float(getattr(settings, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"rag_answer_grounding_min_score\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", 0.18))\\\\\\\\n        max_times = max(1, int(getattr(settings, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"rag_answer_max_regenerate_times\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", 3)))\\\\\\\\n        selected_templates = select_prompt_templates(question)\\\\\\\\n        scenario_guidance = render_prompt_template_guidance(question)\\\\\\\\n        if trace is not None:\\\\\\\\n            trace.scenario_templates = [item.name for item in selected_templates]\\\\\\\\n        retry_note = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        last_answer = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        last_score = 0.0\\\\\\\\n        for attempt in range(max_times):\\\\\\\\n            try:\\\\\\\\n                resp = self._rag_chain.invoke(\\\\\\\\n                    {\\\\\\\\n                        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"context\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": context,\\\\\\\\n                        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"question\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": question,\\\\\\\\n                        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"scenario_guidance\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": scenario_guidance,\\\\\\\\n                        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"retry_note\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": retry_note,\\\\\\\\n                    }\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n                answer_text = (resp.content or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip()\\\\\\\\n            except Exception:\\\\\\\\n                answer_text = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            if not answer_text:\\\\\\\\n                answer_text = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"根据当前检索结果无法确认，建议您补充问题或转人工客服。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            score = self._answer_grounding_score(answer_text, rag_result)\\\\\\\\n            has_citations = self._answer_has_evidence_citations(answer_text)\\\\\\\\n            last_answer = answer_text\\\\\\\\n            last_score = score\\\\\\\\n            if trace is not None:\\\\\\\\n                trace.grounding_score = score\\\\\\\\n                trace.has_evidence_citations = has_citations\\\\\\\\n                trace.regenerate_count = attempt\\\\\\\\n            if score &gt;= min_score and has_citations:\\\\\\\\n                if trace is not None:\\\\\\\\n                    trace.final_status = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"rag_regenerated\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if attempt &gt; 0 else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"rag_grounded\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                return answer_text\\\\\\\\n            citation_note = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"上一版答案缺少证据编号，请在每个关键结论后补充 [证据N]。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if not has_citations else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            retry_note = (\\\\\\\\n                f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"上一版答案与参考内容关联度过低（score={score:.3f} &lt; {min_score:.3f}），\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"请仅保留能直接从参考内容中得到的事实，删除无法从参考内容明确支持的表述后重新回答。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                + citation_note\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n        if trace is not None:\\\\\\\\n            trace.final_status = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"rag_fallback_unconfirmed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            trace.fallback_reason = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"low_grounding_after_regeneration\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        return (\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"根据当前检索结果无法确认，建议您补充更具体的问题或转人工客服。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            if last_score &lt; min_score\\\\\\\\n            else last_answer\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def query(self, question: str) -&gt; Tuple[str, Optional[str]]:\\\\\\\\n src/kb/text2sql.py\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n结构化数据查询：自然语言转 SQL，带 schema 读取/定时检测、意图学习、SQL 约束与校验、执行报错区分、答案生成。\\\\\\\\n- 大模型仅限 DeepSeek（src.llm.get_deepseek_llm），不调用 OpenAI。\\\\\\\\n- 只允许 SELECT；删除等需人工确认；SQL 语法错误时重试最多 3 次；多表必须按关联字段 JOIN，严禁笛卡尔积。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nimport re\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Optional, List, Tuple, Union\\\\\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom config import get_settings\\\\\\\\nfrom src.llm import get_deepseek_llm\\\\\\\\nfrom .schema_loader import SchemaCache, TableRelation, load_schema_overrides, overrides_to_relations\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _get_settings():\\\\\\\\n    return get_settings()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _get_llm():\\\\\\\\n    return get_deepseek_llm(temperature=0)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# 禁止在「自动执行」路径出现的 SQL 关键字（仅允许 SELECT）\\\\\\\\n_SQL_FORBIDDEN = re.compile(\\\\\\\\n    r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\b(DELETE|DROP|TRUNCATE|INSERT|UPDATE|ALTER|CREATE|REPLACE|EXEC|EXECUTE)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\b\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n    re.IGNORECASE,\\\\\\\\n)\\\\\\\\n# 仅允许 SELECT 开头（自动执行时）\\\\\\\\n_SQL_MUST_SELECT = re.compile(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"^\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s*SELECT\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\b\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", re.IGNORECASE | re.DOTALL)\\\\\\\\n# 是否为需人工确认的写操作 SQL（生成后可走确认执行流程）\\\\\\\\n_SQL_DANGEROUS = re.compile(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"^\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s*(DELETE|UPDATE|INSERT|TRUNCATE)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\b\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", re.IGNORECASE | re.DOTALL)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _extract_tables_from_sql(sql: str) -&gt; List[str]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"从 SQL 中提取涉及的表名（FROM / JOIN），用于意图学习。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    tables: List[str] = []\\\\\\\\n    # 简单匹配 FROM table 和 JOIN table\\\\\\\\n    for m in re.finditer(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\b(?:FROM|JOIN)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s+(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\w+)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", sql, re.IGNORECASE):\\\\\\\\n        t = m.group(1).strip()\\\\\\\\n        if t.upper() not in (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SELECT\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"WHERE\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ON\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"AND\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"OR\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"AS\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"):\\\\\\\\n            tables.append(t)\\\\\\\\n    return list(dict.fromkeys(tables))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _normalize_question_for_intent(q: str) -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"用于意图缓存的问句归一化（去空格、小写、保留关键 token）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    s = re.sub(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s+\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", q.strip().lower())\\\\\\\\n    return s[:200]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# ---------- 意图学习：根据历史成功查询记录，推荐使用的表 ----------\\\\\\\\nclass IntentStore:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"记录「问题 → 使用到的表」，相似问题时在 prompt 中注入建议表，帮助大模型选表选字段。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, max_entries: int = 100):\\\\\\\\n        self._max = max_entries\\\\\\\\n        self._entries: List[Tuple[str, List[str]]] = []  # (normalized_question, tables)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def add(self, question: str, tables: List[str]) -&gt; None:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"记录「问题→使用的表」；同题覆盖旧记录，超过 max_entries 时丢弃最旧。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        if not tables:\\\\\\\\n            return\\\\\\\\n        key = _normalize_question_for_intent(question)\\\\\\\\n        self._entries = [(k, t) for k, t in self._entries if k != key]\\\\\\\\n        self._entries.append((key, tables))\\\\\\\\n        if len(self._entries) &gt; self._max:\\\\\\\\n            self._entries = self._entries[-self._max :]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def suggest_tables(self, question: str) -&gt; Optional[List[str]]:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"根据当前问题与历史记录的相似度，返回建议使用的表（简单前缀/包含匹配）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        key = _normalize_question_for_intent(question)\\\\\\\\n        for k, tables in reversed(self._entries):\\\\\\\\n            if key in k or k in key or (len(key) &gt; 5 and key[:5] == k[:5]):\\\\\\\\n                return tables\\\\\\\\n        return None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# ---------- SQL 校验与执行结果类型 ----------\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\nclass ExecuteResult:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"执行结果：区分有数据、无数据、字段/表错误。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    ok: bool\\\\\\\\n    rows: Optional[List[list]] = None\\\\\\\\n    error_type: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"   # \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"no_data\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"syntax\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"field_mismatch\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"other\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    error_message: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\nclass Text2SQLConfirmRequired:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"删除/修改类 SQL 需人工确认后再执行：返回提示文案与待执行 SQL。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    message: str\\\\\\\\n    sql: str\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _validate_sql_select_only(sql: str) -&gt; Tuple[bool, str]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"校验仅为 SELECT，禁止删表/删数据等。返回 (是否通过, 错误信息)。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    sql_clean = re.sub(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--[^\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n]*\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", sql)\\\\\\\\n    if _SQL_FORBIDDEN.search(sql_clean):\\\\\\\\n        return False, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"仅允许 SELECT 查询，禁止 DELETE/DROP/INSERT/UPDATE 等操作。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    if not _SQL_MUST_SELECT.search(sql_clean):\\\\\\\\n        return False, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"必须为 SELECT 语句。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    return True, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _validate_sql_uses_relations(sql: str, relations: List[TableRelation]) -&gt; Tuple[bool, str]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    多表查询时校验 SQL 是否使用了人工配置的关联条件，保证关联字段正确、避免笛卡尔积。\\\\\\\\n    SQL 涉及 2 张及以上表且配置了 relations 时，必须出现至少一条「表.列=表.列」与 relations 一致（顺序可反）。\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    if not relations:\\\\\\\\n        return True, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    tables_in_sql = _extract_tables_from_sql(sql)\\\\\\\\n    if len(tables_in_sql) &lt; 2:\\\\\\\\n        return True, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    sql_norm = re.sub(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s+\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", sql).lower()\\\\\\\\n    for r in relations:\\\\\\\\n        cond1 = f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{r.left_table}.{r.left_column}={r.right_table}.{r.right_column}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        cond2 = f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{r.right_table}.{r.right_column}={r.left_table}.{r.left_column}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        if cond1 in sql_norm or cond2 in sql_norm:\\\\\\\\n            return True, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    allowed = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"；\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join([f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{r.left_table}.{r.left_column}={r.right_table}.{r.right_column}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" for r in relations])\\\\\\\\n    return False, f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"多表查询必须使用人工配置的表间关联条件，严禁笛卡尔积。请使用以下之一（请写表名.列名，勿用别名）：{allowed}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _validate_sql_syntax(sql: str, database_uri: str) -&gt; Tuple[bool, str]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"用 EXPLAIN 检查语法；SQLite 可用。返回 (是否合法, 错误信息)。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\n        from sqlalchemy import create_engine, text\\\\\\\\n        engine = create_engine(database_uri)\\\\\\\\n        with engine.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\n            conn.execute(text(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN {sql}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\n        return True, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\n        return False, str(e)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _execute_sql(sql: str, database_uri: str) -&gt; ExecuteResult:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"执行 SQL 并返回结果；用于 SELECT 或人工确认后的 DELETE/UPDATE。区分字段/表错误与其它异常。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\n        from sqlalchemy import create_engine, text\\\\\\\\n        engine = create_engine(database_uri)\\\\\\\\n        with engine.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\n            rows = conn.execute(text(sql)).fetchall()\\\\\\\\n            return ExecuteResult(ok=True, rows=[list(r) for r in rows])\\\\\\\\n    except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\n        msg = str(e).lower()\\\\\\\\n        if \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"no such column\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in msg or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"no such table\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in msg or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ambiguous\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in msg:\\\\\\\\n            return ExecuteResult(ok=False, error_type=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"field_mismatch\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", error_message=str(e))\\\\\\\\n        return ExecuteResult(ok=False, error_type=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"other\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", error_message=str(e))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# ---------- Prompt 与生成 ----------\\\\\\\\ndef _build_schema_block(schema_text: str, suggested_tables: Optional[List[str]] = None) -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"schema_text 即 context：内含表结构、表/列含义、人工整理的表间关联（表间关联部分会强制校验）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    parts = [schema_text]\\\\\\\\n    if suggested_tables:\\\\\\\\n        parts.append(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n根据历史类似问题，建议优先考虑的表: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(suggested_tables))\\\\\\\\n    return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(parts)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n_TEXT2SQL_SYSTEM = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"你是一个 Text2SQL 助手。请根据用户问题和下面的【数据库表结构】生成单条 SQL。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n【数据库表结构】中已包含：表名、字段名与类型、字段含义、以及「表间关联」列表。多表查询时你必须且仅能使用该列表中的关联条件做 JOIN 或 WHERE，不得自造关联或产生笛卡尔积。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n约束：\\\\\\\\n1. 只允许生成 SELECT 查询语句，严禁 DELETE、DROP、INSERT、UPDATE、TRUNCATE 等。\\\\\\\\n2. 多表查询时必须使用下方「表间关联」中给出的条件（写成 表A.列a=表B.列b，用表名不要用别名），严禁笛卡尔积。\\\\\\\\n3. 只输出一条 SQL，不要解释。若无法从给定表中得到答案，输出: CANNOT_ANSWER\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n{schema_block}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n_TEXT2SQL_HUMAN = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{question}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# 删除/修改意图：生成 DELETE/UPDATE 语句，不执行，仅用于人工确认后执行\\\\\\\\n_TEXT2SQL_WRITE_SYSTEM = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"你是一个数据库操作助手。用户要求删除或修改数据，请根据下面的【数据库表结构】生成单条 SQL。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n约束：\\\\\\\\n1. 只允许生成 DELETE 或 UPDATE 语句，严禁 DROP、TRUNCATE 表、ALTER 等。\\\\\\\\n2. 必须带 WHERE 条件，避免误删全表。\\\\\\\\n3. 只输出一条 SQL，不要解释。若无法从给定表中完成操作，输出: CANNOT_ANSWER\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n{schema_block}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n_TEXT2SQL_WRITE_HUMAN = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{question}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n_ANSWER_FROM_RESULT_SYSTEM = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"你是一名数据查询助手。用户提了一个问题，系统已执行 SQL 并得到如下结果。请根据结果用简洁自然的语言回答用户问题；若结果为空则说明未查到数据。不要编造数据。核心信息说完即结束；简单问题简短答，复杂结果可分点列出。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n_ANSWER_FROM_RESULT_HUMAN = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"用户问题：{question}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n查询结果（行/列）：\\\\\\\\n{result_text}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n请用一两句话回答用户：\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass Text2SQL:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    自然语言转 SQL：意图判断 → 取 schema（含人工关联）→ 生成 SELECT/DELETE/UPDATE →\\\\\\\\n    校验（仅 SELECT 自动执行；多表必须用人工关联；写操作返回待确认）。\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        table_comments: Optional[dict] = None,\\\\\\\\n        column_comments: Optional[dict] = None,\\\\\\\\n        extra_relations: Optional[List[TableRelation]] = None,\\\\\\\\n    ):\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"初始化 schema 缓存、意图库、SELECT/答案/写操作三条 LLM 链（仅 DeepSeek）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        self._settings = _get_settings()\\\\\\\\n        self._schema_cache = SchemaCache(\\\\\\\\n            self._settings.text2sql_schema_refresh_interval_seconds,\\\\\\\\n            overrides_path=self._settings.text2sql_schema_overrides_path,\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n        if table_comments:\\\\\\\\n            self._schema_cache.set_comment_overrides(table_comments, column_comments)\\\\\\\\n        if extra_relations:\\\\\\\\n            self._schema_cache.set_extra_relations(extra_relations)\\\\\\\\n        self._intent_store = IntentStore()\\\\\\\\n        self._llm = _get_llm()\\\\\\\\n        self._chain_sql = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([\\\\\\\\n            (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"system\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", _TEXT2SQL_SYSTEM),\\\\\\\\n            (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"human\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", _TEXT2SQL_HUMAN),\\\\\\\\n        ]) | self._llm\\\\\\\\n        self._chain_answer = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([\\\\\\\\n            (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"system\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", _ANSWER_FROM_RESULT_SYSTEM),\\\\\\\\n            (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"human\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", _ANSWER_FROM_RESULT_HUMAN),\\\\\\\\n        ]) | self._llm\\\\\\\\n        self._chain_write = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([\\\\\\\\n            (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"system\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", _TEXT2SQL_WRITE_SYSTEM),\\\\\\\\n            (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"human\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", _TEXT2SQL_WRITE_HUMAN),\\\\\\\\n        ]) | self._llm\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _is_sql_question(self, question: str) -&gt; bool:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"启发式：是否像数据查询。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        q = question.strip()\\\\\\\\n        triggers = [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"多少\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"哪些\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"是什么\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"数量\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"进口\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"出口\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"企业\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"认证\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"口岸\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"年份\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"2023\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"2024\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"查询\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"统计\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n        return any(t in q for t in triggers) and (any(c in \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"0123456789\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" for c in q) or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"哪些\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in q or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"多少\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in q or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"查询\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in q)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _is_delete_intent(self, question: str) -&gt; bool:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"是否包含删除意图，需人工确认。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        q = question.strip()\\\\\\\\n        return any(kw in q for kw in [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"删除\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"删掉\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"清空\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"去掉\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"])\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _query_write_confirm(self, question: str) -&gt; Union[str, Text2SQLConfirmRequired]:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"删除/修改意图：生成 DELETE/UPDATE SQL，不执行，返回待人工确认。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        schema_text = self._schema_cache.get_schema()\\\\\\\\n        schema_block = _build_schema_block(schema_text, None)\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\n            out = self._chain_write.invoke({\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"schema_block\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": schema_block, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"question\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": question})\\\\\\\\n            raw = (out.content or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip()\\\\\\\\n            if \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"CANNOT_ANSWER\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in raw:\\\\\\\\n                return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"无法根据当前表结构生成删除/修改语句，请转人工或补充条件。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            sql = re.sub(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"^&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\w*\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", raw)\\\\\\\\n            sql = re.sub(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n?&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s*$\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", sql).strip()\\\\\\\\n            if not sql:\\\\\\\\n                return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"涉及删除或修改数据的操作需要人工确认后才能执行。请转人工或在使用删除功能前再次确认。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            if not _SQL_DANGEROUS.search(sql):\\\\\\\\n                return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"当前仅支持删除或修改类操作的人工确认执行。请明确为删除/清空等意图后重试或转人工。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            return Text2SQLConfirmRequired(\\\\\\\\n                message=(\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"检测到删除/修改操作，需人工确认后执行。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n拟执行 SQL：\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                    + sql\\\\\\\\n                    + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n确认执行请调用 API POST /text2sql/confirm_execute 并传入 conversation_id，或在该对话中回复「确认执行」。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                ),\\\\\\\\n                sql=sql,\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\\\\\n            return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"涉及删除或修改数据的操作需要人工确认后才能执行。生成 SQL 时发生异常，请稍后重试或转人工客服。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def query(self, question: str) -&gt; Optional[Union[str, Text2SQLConfirmRequired]]:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        若判定为数据查询则：取 schema → 生成 SELECT → 校验 → 执行 → 用 LLM 生成答案。\\\\\\\\n        若为删除/修改意图则生成 DELETE/UPDATE SQL，不执行，返回 Text2SQLConfirmRequired 供人工确认后执行。\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        if not self._is_sql_question(question) and not self._is_delete_intent(question):\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\n        if self._is_delete_intent(question):\\\\\\\\n            return self._query_write_confirm(question)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        # 表关联放在 context 里喂给大模型：schema_text 内含「表间关联」列表（仅人工整理），作为 system 的 {schema_block}\\\\\\\\n        schema_text = self._schema_cache.get_schema()\\\\\\\\n        suggested_tables = self._intent_store.suggest_tables(question)\\\\\\\\n        schema_block = _build_schema_block(schema_text, suggested_tables)\\\\\\\\n        # 人工关联列表用于后续校验：多表 SQL 必须使用其中至少一条，否则拒绝\\\\\\\\n        overrides = load_schema_overrides(self._settings.text2sql_schema_overrides_path)\\\\\\\\n        human_relations = overrides_to_relations(overrides.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"relations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or [])\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        uri = self._settings.text2sql_database_uri\\\\\\\\n        last_syntax_error = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        # 最多 3 次生成：每次校验 SELECT 仅读、语法、多表关联，失败则把错误注入 prompt 重试\\\\\\\\n        for attempt in range(3):\\\\\\\\n            try:\\\\\\\\n                out = self._chain_sql.invoke({\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"schema_block\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": schema_block, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"question\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": question})\\\\\\\\n                raw = (out.content or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip()\\\\\\\\n                if \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"CANNOT_ANSWER\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in raw:\\\\\\\\n                    return None\\\\\\\\n                sql = re.sub(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"^&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\w*\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", raw)\\\\\\\\n                sql = re.sub(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n?&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s*$\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", sql).strip()\\\\\\\\n                if not sql:\\\\\\\\n                    continue\\\\\\\\n                ok, err = _validate_sql_select_only(sql)\\\\\\\\n                if not ok:\\\\\\\\n                    last_syntax_error = err\\\\\\\\n                    schema_block = schema_block + f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n上一轮错误：{err}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n请只输出一条合法的 SELECT 语句。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                    continue\\\\\\\\n                ok, err = _validate_sql_syntax(sql, uri)\\\\\\\\n                if not ok:\\\\\\\\n                    last_syntax_error = err\\\\\\\\n                    schema_block = schema_block + f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n上一轮 SQL 语法/执行计划错误：{err}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n请修正后只输出一条 SELECT。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                    continue\\\\\\\\n                # 多表时强制校验：必须使用人工配置的关联条件，保证关联字段正确\\\\\\\\n                ok, err = _validate_sql_uses_relations(sql, human_relations)\\\\\\\\n                if not ok:\\\\\\\\n                    last_syntax_error = err\\\\\\\\n                    schema_block = schema_block + f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n上一轮错误：{err}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n请严格使用上述「表间关联」中的条件。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                    continue\\\\\\\\n                break\\\\\\\\n            except Exception as e:\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":369}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/nanqi/Desktop/常用文件/rag_code_rewritebyai/src/kb/text2sql.py\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"offset\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"limit\\\\\\\":320},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# src/kb/text2sql.py\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n结构化数据查询：自然语言转 SQL，带 schema 读取/定时检测、意图学习、SQL 约束与校验、执行报错区分、答案生成。\\\\\\\\n- 大模型仅限 DeepSeek（src.llm.get_deepseek_llm），不调用 OpenAI。\\\\\\\\n- 只允许 SELECT；删除等需人工确认；SQL 语法错误时重试最多 3 次；多表必须按关联字段 JOIN，严禁笛卡尔积。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nimport re\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Optional, List, Tuple, Union\\\\\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom config import get_settings\\\\\\\\nfrom src.llm import get_deepseek_llm\\\\\\\\nfrom .schema_loader import SchemaCache, TableRelation, load_schema_overrides, overrides_to_relations\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _get_settings():\\\\\\\\n    return get_settings()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _get_llm():\\\\\\\\n    return get_deepseek_llm(temperature=0)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# 禁止在「自动执行」路径出现的 SQL 关键字（仅允许 SELECT）\\\\\\\\n_SQL_FORBIDDEN = re.compile(\\\\\\\\n    r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\b(DELETE|DROP|TRUNCATE|INSERT|UPDATE|ALTER|CREATE|REPLACE|EXEC|EXECUTE)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\b\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n    re.IGNORECASE,\\\\\\\\n)\\\\\\\\n# 仅允许 SELECT 开头（自动执行时）\\\\\\\\n_SQL_MUST_SELECT = re.compile(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"^\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s*SELECT\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\b\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", re.IGNORECASE | re.DOTALL)\\\\\\\\n# 是否为需人工确认的写操作 SQL（生成后可走确认执行流程）\\\\\\\\n_SQL_DANGEROUS = re.compile(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"^\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s*(DELETE|UPDATE|INSERT|TRUNCATE)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\b\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", re.IGNORECASE | re.DOTALL)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _extract_tables_from_sql(sql: str) -&gt; List[str]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"从 SQL 中提取涉及的表名（FROM / JOIN），用于意图学习。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    tables: List[str] = []\\\\\\\\n    # 简单匹配 FROM table 和 JOIN table\\\\\\\\n    for m in re.finditer(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\b(?:FROM|JOIN)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s+(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\w+)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", sql, re.IGNORECASE):\\\\\\\\n        t = m.group(1).strip()\\\\\\\\n        if t.upper() not in (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SELECT\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"WHERE\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ON\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"AND\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"OR\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"AS\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"):\\\\\\\\n            tables.append(t)\\\\\\\\n    return list(dict.fromkeys(tables))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _normalize_question_for_intent(q: str) -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"用于意图缓存的问句归一化（去空格、小写、保留关键 token）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    s = re.sub(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s+\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", q.strip().lower())\\\\\\\\n    return s[:200]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# ---------- 意图学习：根据历史成功查询记录，推荐使用的表 ----------\\\\\\\\nclass IntentStore:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"记录「问题 → 使用到的表」，相似问题时在 prompt 中注入建议表，帮助大模型选表选字段。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, max_entries: int = 100):\\\\\\\\n        self._max = max_entries\\\\\\\\n        self._entries: List[Tuple[str, List[str]]] = []  # (normalized_question, tables)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def add(self, question: str, tables: List[str]) -&gt; None:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"记录「问题→使用的表」；同题覆盖旧记录，超过 max_entries 时丢弃最旧。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        if not tables:\\\\\\\\n            return\\\\\\\\n        key = _normalize_question_for_intent(question)\\\\\\\\n        self._entries = [(k, t) for k, t in self._entries if k != key]\\\\\\\\n        self._entries.append((key, tables))\\\\\\\\n        if len(self._entries) &gt; self._max:\\\\\\\\n            self._entries = self._entries[-self._max :]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def suggest_tables(self, question: str) -&gt; Optional[List[str]]:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"根据当前问题与历史记录的相似度，返回建议使用的表（简单前缀/包含匹配）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        key = _normalize_question_for_intent(question)\\\\\\\\n        for k, tables in reversed(self._entries):\\\\\\\\n            if key in k or k in key or (len(key) &gt; 5 and key[:5] == k[:5]):\\\\\\\\n                return tables\\\\\\\\n        return None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# ---------- SQL 校验与执行结果类型 ----------\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\nclass ExecuteResult:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"执行结果：区分有数据、无数据、字段/表错误。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    ok: bool\\\\\\\\n    rows: Optional[List[list]] = None\\\\\\\\n    error_type: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"   # \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"no_data\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"syntax\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"field_mismatch\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"other\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    error_message: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\nclass Text2SQLConfirmRequired:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"删除/修改类 SQL 需人工确认后再执行：返回提示文案与待执行 SQL。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    message: str\\\\\\\\n    sql: str\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _validate_sql_select_only(sql: str) -&gt; Tuple[bool, str]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"校验仅为 SELECT，禁止删表/删数据等。返回 (是否通过, 错误信息)。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    sql_clean = re.sub(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--[^\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n]*\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", sql)\\\\\\\\n    if _SQL_FORBIDDEN.search(sql_clean):\\\\\\\\n        return False, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"仅允许 SELECT 查询，禁止 DELETE/DROP/INSERT/UPDATE 等操作。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    if not _SQL_MUST_SELECT.search(sql_clean):\\\\\\\\n        return False, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"必须为 SELECT 语句。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    return True, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _validate_sql_uses_relations(sql: str, relations: List[TableRelation]) -&gt; Tuple[bool, str]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    多表查询时校验 SQL 是否使用了人工配置的关联条件，保证关联字段正确、避免笛卡尔积。\\\\\\\\n    SQL 涉及 2 张及以上表且配置了 relations 时，必须出现至少一条「表.列=表.列」与 relations 一致（顺序可反）。\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    if not relations:\\\\\\\\n        return True, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    tables_in_sql = _extract_tables_from_sql(sql)\\\\\\\\n    if len(tables_in_sql) &lt; 2:\\\\\\\\n        return True, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    sql_norm = re.sub(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s+\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", sql).lower()\\\\\\\\n    for r in relations:\\\\\\\\n        cond1 = f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{r.left_table}.{r.left_column}={r.right_table}.{r.right_column}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        cond2 = f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{r.right_table}.{r.right_column}={r.left_table}.{r.left_column}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        if cond1 in sql_norm or cond2 in sql_norm:\\\\\\\\n            return True, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    allowed = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"；\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join([f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{r.left_table}.{r.left_column}={r.right_table}.{r.right_column}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" for r in relations])\\\\\\\\n    return False, f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"多表查询必须使用人工配置的表间关联条件，严禁笛卡尔积。请使用以下之一（请写表名.列名，勿用别名）：{allowed}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _validate_sql_syntax(sql: str, database_uri: str) -&gt; Tuple[bool, str]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"用 EXPLAIN 检查语法；SQLite 可用。返回 (是否合法, 错误信息)。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\n        from sqlalchemy import create_engine, text\\\\\\\\n        engine = create_engine(database_uri)\\\\\\\\n        with engine.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\n            conn.execute(text(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN {sql}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\n        return True, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\n        return False, str(e)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _execute_sql(sql: str, database_uri: str) -&gt; ExecuteResult:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"执行 SQL 并返回结果；用于 SELECT 或人工确认后的 DELETE/UPDATE。区分字段/表错误与其它异常。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\n        from sqlalchemy import create_engine, text\\\\\\\\n        engine = create_engine(database_uri)\\\\\\\\n        with engine.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\n            rows = conn.execute(text(sql)).fetchall()\\\\\\\\n            return ExecuteResult(ok=True, rows=[list(r) for r in rows])\\\\\\\\n    except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\n        msg = str(e).lower()\\\\\\\\n        if \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"no such column\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in msg or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"no such table\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in msg or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ambiguous\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in msg:\\\\\\\\n            return ExecuteResult(ok=False, error_type=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"field_mismatch\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", error_message=str(e))\\\\\\\\n        return ExecuteResult(ok=False, error_type=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"other\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", error_message=str(e))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# ---------- Prompt 与生成 ----------\\\\\\\\ndef _build_schema_block(schema_text: str, suggested_tables: Optional[List[str]] = None) -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"schema_text 即 context：内含表结构、表/列含义、人工整理的表间关联（表间关联部分会强制校验）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    parts = [schema_text]\\\\\\\\n    if suggested_tables:\\\\\\\\n        parts.append(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n根据历史类似问题，建议优先考虑的表: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(suggested_tables))\\\\\\\\n    return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(parts)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n_TEXT2SQL_SYSTEM = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"你是一个 Text2SQL 助手。请根据用户问题和下面的【数据库表结构】生成单条 SQL。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n【数据库表结构】中已包含：表名、字段名与类型、字段含义、以及「表间关联」列表。多表查询时你必须且仅能使用该列表中的关联条件做 JOIN 或 WHERE，不得自造关联或产生笛卡尔积。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n约束：\\\\\\\\n1. 只允许生成 SELECT 查询语句，严禁 DELETE、DROP、INSERT、UPDATE、TRUNCATE 等。\\\\\\\\n2. 多表查询时必须使用下方「表间关联」中给出的条件（写成 表A.列a=表B.列b，用表名不要用别名），严禁笛卡尔积。\\\\\\\\n3. 只输出一条 SQL，不要解释。若无法从给定表中得到答案，输出: CANNOT_ANSWER\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n{schema_block}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n_TEXT2SQL_HUMAN = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{question}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# 删除/修改意图：生成 DELETE/UPDATE 语句，不执行，仅用于人工确认后执行\\\\\\\\n_TEXT2SQL_WRITE_SYSTEM = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"你是一个数据库操作助手。用户要求删除或修改数据，请根据下面的【数据库表结构】生成单条 SQL。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n约束：\\\\\\\\n1. 只允许生成 DELETE 或 UPDATE 语句，严禁 DROP、TRUNCATE 表、ALTER 等。\\\\\\\\n2. 必须带 WHERE 条件，避免误删全表。\\\\\\\\n3. 只输出一条 SQL，不要解释。若无法从给定表中完成操作，输出: CANNOT_ANSWER\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n{schema_block}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n_TEXT2SQL_WRITE_HUMAN = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{question}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n_ANSWER_FROM_RESULT_SYSTEM = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"你是一名数据查询助手。用户提了一个问题，系统已执行 SQL 并得到如下结果。请根据结果用简洁自然的语言回答用户问题；若结果为空则说明未查到数据。不要编造数据。核心信息说完即结束；简单问题简短答，复杂结果可分点列出。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n_ANSWER_FROM_RESULT_HUMAN = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"用户问题：{question}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n查询结果（行/列）：\\\\\\\\n{result_text}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n请用一两句话回答用户：\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass Text2SQL:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    自然语言转 SQL：意图判断 → 取 schema（含人工关联）→ 生成 SELECT/DELETE/UPDATE →\\\\\\\\n    校验（仅 SELECT 自动执行；多表必须用人工关联；写操作返回待确认）。\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        table_comments: Optional[dict] = None,\\\\\\\\n        column_comments: Optional[dict] = None,\\\\\\\\n        extra_relations: Optional[List[TableRelation]] = None,\\\\\\\\n    ):\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"初始化 schema 缓存、意图库、SELECT/答案/写操作三条 LLM 链（仅 DeepSeek）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        self._settings = _get_settings()\\\\\\\\n        self._schema_cache = SchemaCache(\\\\\\\\n            self._settings.text2sql_schema_refresh_interval_seconds,\\\\\\\\n            overrides_path=self._settings.text2sql_schema_overrides_path,\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n        if table_comments:\\\\\\\\n            self._schema_cache.set_comment_overrides(table_comments, column_comments)\\\\\\\\n        if extra_relations:\\\\\\\\n            self._schema_cache.set_extra_relations(extra_relations)\\\\\\\\n        self._intent_store = IntentStore()\\\\\\\\n        self._llm = _get_llm()\\\\\\\\n        self._chain_sql = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([\\\\\\\\n            (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"system\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", _TEXT2SQL_SYSTEM),\\\\\\\\n            (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"human\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", _TEXT2SQL_HUMAN),\\\\\\\\n        ]) | self._llm\\\\\\\\n        self._chain_answer = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([\\\\\\\\n            (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"system\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", _ANSWER_FROM_RESULT_SYSTEM),\\\\\\\\n            (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"human\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", _ANSWER_FROM_RESULT_HUMAN),\\\\\\\\n        ]) | self._llm\\\\\\\\n        self._chain_write = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([\\\\\\\\n            (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"system\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", _TEXT2SQL_WRITE_SYSTEM),\\\\\\\\n            (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"human\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", _TEXT2SQL_WRITE_HUMAN),\\\\\\\\n        ]) | self._llm\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _is_sql_question(self, question: str) -&gt; bool:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"启发式：是否像数据查询。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        q = question.strip()\\\\\\\\n        triggers = [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"多少\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"哪些\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"是什么\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"数量\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"进口\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"出口\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"企业\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"认证\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"口岸\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"年份\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"2023\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"2024\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"查询\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"统计\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n        return any(t in q for t in triggers) and (any(c in \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"0123456789\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" for c in q) or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"哪些\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in q or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"多少\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in q or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"查询\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in q)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _is_delete_intent(self, question: str) -&gt; bool:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"是否包含删除意图，需人工确认。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        q = question.strip()\\\\\\\\n        return any(kw in q for kw in [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"删除\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"删掉\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"清空\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"去掉\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"])\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _query_write_confirm(self, question: str) -&gt; Union[str, Text2SQLConfirmRequired]:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"删除/修改意图：生成 DELETE/UPDATE SQL，不执行，返回待人工确认。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        schema_text = self._schema_cache.get_schema()\\\\\\\\n        schema_block = _build_schema_block(schema_text, None)\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\n            out = self._chain_write.invoke({\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"schema_block\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": schema_block, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"question\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": question})\\\\\\\\n            raw = (out.content or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip()\\\\\\\\n            if \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"CANNOT_ANSWER\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in raw:\\\\\\\\n                return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"无法根据当前表结构生成删除/修改语句，请转人工或补充条件。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            sql = re.sub(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"^&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\w*\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", raw)\\\\\\\\n            sql = re.sub(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n?&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s*$\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", sql).strip()\\\\\\\\n            if not sql:\\\\\\\\n                return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"涉及删除或修改数据的操作需要人工确认后才能执行。请转人工或在使用删除功能前再次确认。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            if not _SQL_DANGEROUS.search(sql):\\\\\\\\n                return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"当前仅支持删除或修改类操作的人工确认执行。请明确为删除/清空等意图后重试或转人工。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            return Text2SQLConfirmRequired(\\\\\\\\n                message=(\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"检测到删除/修改操作，需人工确认后执行。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n拟执行 SQL：\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                    + sql\\\\\\\\n                    + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n确认执行请调用 API POST /text2sql/confirm_execute 并传入 conversation_id，或在该对话中回复「确认执行」。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                ),\\\\\\\\n                sql=sql,\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\\\\\n            return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"涉及删除或修改数据的操作需要人工确认后才能执行。生成 SQL 时发生异常，请稍后重试或转人工客服。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def query(self, question: str) -&gt; Optional[Union[str, Text2SQLConfirmRequired]]:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        若判定为数据查询则：取 schema → 生成 SELECT → 校验 → 执行 → 用 LLM 生成答案。\\\\\\\\n        若为删除/修改意图则生成 DELETE/UPDATE SQL，不执行，返回 Text2SQLConfirmRequired 供人工确认后执行。\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        if not self._is_sql_question(question) and not self._is_delete_intent(question):\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\n        if self._is_delete_intent(question):\\\\\\\\n            return self._query_write_confirm(question)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        # 表关联放在 context 里喂给大模型：schema_text 内含「表间关联」列表（仅人工整理），作为 system 的 {schema_block}\\\\\\\\n        schema_text = self._schema_cache.get_schema()\\\\\\\\n        suggested_tables = self._intent_store.suggest_tables(question)\\\\\\\\n load_schema_overrides(self._settings.text2sql_schema_overrides_path)\\\\\\\\n        human_relations = overrides_to_relations(overrides.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"relations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or [])\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        uri = self._settings.text2sql_database_uri\\\\\\\\n        last_syntax_error = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        # 最多 3 次生成：每次校验 SELECT 仅读、语法、多表关联，失败则把错误注入 prompt 重试\\\\\\\\n        for attempt in range(3):\\\\\\\\n            try:\\\\\\\\n                out = self._chain_sql.invoke({\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"schema_block\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": schema_block, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"question\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": question})\\\\\\\\n                raw = (out.content or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip()\\\\\\\\n                if re.sub(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"^&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\w*\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", raw)\\\\\\\\n                sql = re.sub(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n?&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s*$\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", sql).strip()\\\\\\\\n                if not sql:\\\\\\\\n                    continue\\\\\\\\n                ok, err = _validate_sql_select_only(sql)\\\\\\\\n                if not ok:\\\\\\\\n                    last_syntax_error = err\\\\\\\\n                    schema_block = schema_block + f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n上一轮错误：{err}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n请只输出一条合法的 SELECT 语句。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                    continue\\\\\\\\n src/kb/qa_store.py\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n高频 QA 对精准匹配：问法固定、答案明确时直接返回预设答案，避免向量误匹配。\\\\\\\\n不依赖任何大模型或 OpenAI，仅本地 JSON 检索。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nimport json\\\\\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Optional\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom config import get_settings\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass QAStore:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    从 JSON 文件加载高频问答对（如 12360 热线清洗数据），\\\\\\\\n    支持精确匹配与简单包含匹配，命中则直接返回答案。\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, path: Optional[str] = None):\\\\\\\\n        self._path = path or get_settings().qa_data_path\\\\\\\\n        self._qa: list[dict] = []\\\\\\\\n        self._load()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _load(self) -&gt; None:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"从 qa_data_path 读取 JSON，支持 list 或 { \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"qa_pairs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [...] } 格式。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        p = Path(self._path)\\\\\\\\n        if not p.exists():\\\\\\\\n            return\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\n            with open(p, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") as f:\\\\\\\\n                data = json.load(f)\\\\\\\\n            if isinstance(data, list):\\\\\\\\n                self._qa = data\\\\\\\\n            elif isinstance(data, dict) and \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"qa_pairs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in data:\\\\\\\\n                self._qa = data[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"qa_pairs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n            else:\\\\\\\\n                self._qa = []\\\\\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\\\\\n            self._qa = []\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _normalize(self, s: str) -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"去空格、小写，用于问句匹配。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(s.split()).lower().strip()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def find(self, question: str) -&gt; Optional[str]:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"优先精确匹配，再按包含关系匹配。返回答案或 None。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        q_norm = self._normalize(question)\\\\\\\\n        for item in self._qa:\\\\\\\\n            q = item.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"question\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or item.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"q\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            a = item.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"answer\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or item.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"a\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            if self._normalize(q) == q_norm:\\\\\\\\n
