Optional\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n_OBS_TABLE = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"qa_observation\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n_TRACE_TABLE = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"qa_rag_trace\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n_FEEDBACK_TABLE = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"qa_feedback\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _ensure_table(uri: str) -&gt; None:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"创建问答监控与反馈分析所需的 PostgreSQL 表。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    from sqlalchemy import create_engine, text\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    engine = create_engine(uri, pool_pre_ping=True)\\\\\\\\n    with engine.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\n        conn.execute(text(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {_OBS_TABLE} (\\\\\\\\n                observation_id    VARCHAR(64) PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\n                thread_id         VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n                conversation_id   VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n                user_id           VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n                question          TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n                answer            TEXT,\\\\\\\\n                route             VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n                response_mode     VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'sync',\\\\\\\\n                success           BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,\\\\\\\\n                used_cache        BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,\\\\\\\\n                pending_sql       BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,\\\\\\\\n                latency_ms        INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n                quality_label     VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unknown',\\\\\\\\n                fallback_reason   VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n                llm_model         VARCHAR(128),\\\\\\\\n                llm_endpoint_name VARCHAR(128),\\\\\\\\n                created_at        TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\n        conn.execute(text(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_{_OBS_TABLE}_conversation_created\\\\\\\\n            ON {_OBS_TABLE}(conversation_id, created_at DESC)\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\n        conn.execute(text(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_{_OBS_TABLE}_user_created\\\\\\\\n            ON {_OBS_TABLE}(user_id, created_at DESC)\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\n        conn.execute(text(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {_TRACE_TABLE} (\\\\\\\\n                id                    SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\n                observation_id        VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n                final_status          VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',\\\\\\\\n                retrieve_attempt      INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n                top_match_score       DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n                top_normalized_score  DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n                grounding_score       DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n                regenerate_count      INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n                has_evidence_citations BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,\\\\\\\\n                source_count          INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n                scenario_templates    JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,\\\\\\\\n                retrieved_doc_ids     JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,\\\\\\\\n                retrieved_chunk_ids   JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,\\\\\\\\n                extra                 JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{{}}'::jsonb,\\\\\\\\n                created_at            TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\n        conn.execute(text(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_{_TRACE_TABLE}_observation_id\\\\\\\\n            ON {_TRACE_TABLE}(observation_id)\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\n        conn.execute(text(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {_FEEDBACK_TABLE} (\\\\\\\\n                id              SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\n                observation_id  VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n                conversation_id VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n                user_id         VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n                actor_key       VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n                rating          VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n                tags            JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,\\\\\\\\n                free_text       TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',\\\\\\\\n                created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n                updated_at      TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n                UNIQUE(actor_key, observation_id)\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\n        conn.execute(text(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_{_FEEDBACK_TABLE}_conversation_created\\\\\\\\n            ON {_FEEDBACK_TABLE}(conversation_id, created_at DESC)\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\n        conn.execute(text(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_{_FEEDBACK_TABLE}_rating_created\\\\\\\\n            ON {_FEEDBACK_TABLE}(rating, created_at DESC)\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\n        conn.commit()\\\\\\\\n    engine.dispose()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef ensure_table_if_configured(uri: Optional[str]) -&gt; None:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"当配置了 PostgreSQL URI 时创建问答监控相关表。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if not (uri or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip() or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"postgresql\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" not in (uri or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").lower():\\\\\\\\n        return\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\n        _ensure_table((uri or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip())\\\\\\\\n    except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\n        logger.warning(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"创建问答监控表失败: %s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", e)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef save_observation(uri: str, observation: dict[str, Any], trace: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None) -&gt; None:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"保存一条问答观测记录，并可选写入对应的 RAG 追踪信息。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    from sqlalchemy import create_engine, text\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    engine = create_engine(uri, pool_pre_ping=True)\\\\\\\\n    obs = dict(observation or {})\\\\\\\\n    observation_id = str(obs.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"observation_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip()\\\\\\\\n    if not observation_id:\\\\\\\\n        engine.dispose()\\\\\\\\n        return\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\n        with engine.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\\\\\n                text(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                    INSERT INTO {_OBS_TABLE} (\\\\\\\\n                        observation_id, thread_id, conversation_id, user_id, question, answer,\\\\\\\\n                        route, response_mode, success, used_cache, pending_sql, latency_ms,\\\\\\\\n                        quality_label, fallback_reason, llm_model, llm_endpoint_name, created_at\\\\\\\\n                    )\\\\\\\\n                    VALUES (\\\\\\\\n                        :observation_id, :thread_id, :conversation_id, :user_id, :question, :answer,\\\\\\\\n                        :route, :response_mode, :success, :used_cache, :pending_sql, :latency_ms,\\\\\\\\n                        :quality_label, :fallback_reason, :llm_model, :llm_endpoint_name, NOW()\\\\\\\\n                    )\\\\\\\\n                    ON CONFLICT (observation_id)\\\\\\\\n                    DO UPDATE SET\\\\\\\\n                        answer = EXCLUDED.answer,\\\\\\\\n                        route = EXCLUDED.route,\\\\\\\\n                        response_mode = EXCLUDED.response_mode,\\\\\\\\n                        success = EXCLUDED.success,\\\\\\\\n                        used_cache = EXCLUDED.used_cache,\\\\\\\\n                        pending_sql = EXCLUDED.pending_sql,\\\\\\\\n                        latency_ms = EXCLUDED.latency_ms,\\\\\\\\n                        quality_label = EXCLUDED.quality_label,\\\\\\\\n                        fallback_reason = EXCLUDED.fallback_reason,\\\\\\\\n                        llm_model = EXCLUDED.llm_model,\\\\\\\\n                        llm_endpoint_name = EXCLUDED.llm_endpoint_name\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n                {\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"observation_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": observation_id[:64],\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"thread_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": str(obs.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"thread_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")[:512],\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"conversation_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": str(obs.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"conversation_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")[:128],\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"user_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": obs.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"user_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"question\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": str(obs.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"question\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")[:20000],\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"answer\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": str(obs.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"answer\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")[:65535],\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"route\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": str(obs.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"route\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")[:64],\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"response_mode\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": str(obs.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"response_mode\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sync\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")[:16],\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": bool(obs.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", True)),\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"used_cache\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": bool(obs.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"used_cache\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", False)),\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pending_sql\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": bool(obs.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pending_sql\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", False)),\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"latency_ms\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": int(obs.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"latency_ms\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or 0),\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"quality_label\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": str(obs.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"quality_label\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")[:64],\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"fallback_reason\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": str(obs.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"fallback_reason\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")[:255] or None,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"llm_model\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": str(obs.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"llm_model\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")[:128] or None,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"llm_endpoint_name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": str(obs.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"llm_endpoint_name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")[:128] or None,\\\\\\\\n                },\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n            if trace is not None:\\\\\\\\n                conn.execute(text(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"DELETE FROM {_TRACE_TABLE} WHERE observation_id = :observation_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"), {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"observation_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": observation_id[:64]})\\\\\\\\n                conn.execute(\\\\\\\\n                    text(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                        INSERT INTO {_TRACE_TABLE} (\\\\\\\\n                            observation_id, final_status, retrieve_attempt, top_match_score, top_normalized_score,\\\\\\\\n                            grounding_score, regenerate_count, has_evidence_citations, source_count,\\\\\\\\n                            scenario_templates, retrieved_doc_ids, retrieved_chunk_ids, extra, created_at\\\\\\\\n                        )\\\\\\\\n                        VALUES (\\\\\\\\n                            :observation_id, :final_status, :retrieve_attempt, :top_match_score, :top_normalized_score,\\\\\\\\n                            :grounding_score, :regenerate_count, :has_evidence_citations, :source_count,\\\\\\\\n                            CAST(:scenario_templates AS JSONB), CAST(:retrieved_doc_ids AS JSONB),\\\\\\\\n                            CAST(:retrieved_chunk_ids AS JSONB), CAST(:extra AS JSONB), NOW()\\\\\\\\n                        )\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n                    {\\\\\\\\n                        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"observation_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": observation_id[:64],\\\\\\\\n                        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"final_status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": str(trace.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"final_status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")[:64],\\\\\\\\n                        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"retrieve_attempt\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": int(trace.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"retrieve_attempt\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or 0),\\\\\\\\n                        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"top_match_score\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": float(trace.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"top_match_score\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or 0),\\\\\\\\n                        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"top_normalized_score\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": float(trace.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"top_normalized_score\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or 0),\\\\\\\\n                        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"grounding_score\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": float(trace.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"grounding_score\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or 0),\\\\\\\\n                        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"regenerate_count\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": int(trace.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"regenerate_count\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or 0),\\\\\\\\n                        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"has_evidence_citations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": bool(trace.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"has_evidence_citations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", False)),\\\\\\\\n                        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"source_count\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": int(trace.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"source_count\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or 0),\\\\\\\\n                        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"scenario_templates\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": json.dumps(trace.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"scenario_templates\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or [], ensure_ascii=False),\\\\\\\\n                        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"retrieved_doc_ids\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": json.dumps(trace.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"retrieved_doc_ids\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or [], ensure_ascii=False),\\\\\\\\n                        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"retrieved_chunk_ids\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": json.dumps(trace.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"retrieved_chunk_ids\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or [], ensure_ascii=False),\\\\\\\\n                        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"extra\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": json.dumps(trace, ensure_ascii=False),\\\\\\\\n                    },\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n            conn.commit()\\\\\\\\n    except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\n        logger.warning(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"保存问答观测失败: %s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", e)\\\\\\\\n    finally:\\\\\\\\n        engine.dispose()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef list_conversation_observations(uri: str, conversation_id: str, user_id: Optional[str]) -&gt; list[dict[str, Any]]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"按时间顺序列出某会话下的观测记录，用于将 observation_id 映射回历史消息。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    from sqlalchemy import create_engine, text\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    engine = create_engine(uri, pool_pre_ping=True)\\\\\\\\n    out: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\n        with engine.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\n            if user_id is None:\\\\\\\\n                rows = conn.execute(\\\\\\\\n                    text(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                        SELECT observation_id, route, answer, created_at\\\\\\\\n                        FROM {_OBS_TABLE}\\\\\\\\n                        WHERE conversation_id = :conversation_id AND user_id IS NULL\\\\\\\\n                          AND success = TRUE\\\\\\\\n                          AND COALESCE(answer, '') &lt;&gt; ''\\\\\\\\n                        ORDER BY created_at ASC\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n                    {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"conversation_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": conversation_id[:128]},\\\\\\\\n                ).fetchall()\\\\\\\\n            else:\\\\\\\\n                rows = conn.execute(\\\\\\\\n                    text(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                        SELECT observation_id, route, answer, created_at\\\\\\\\n                        FROM {_OBS_TABLE}\\\\\\\\n                        WHERE conversation_id = :conversation_id AND user_id = :user_id\\\\\\\\n                          AND success = TRUE\\\\\\\\n                          AND COALESCE(answer, '') &lt;&gt; ''\\\\\\\\n                        ORDER BY created_at ASC\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n                    {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"conversation_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": conversation_id[:128], \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"user_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": user_id},\\\\\\\\n                ).fetchall()\\\\\\\\n        for row in rows:\\\\\\\\n            out.append({\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"observation_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": row[0],\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"route\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": row[1] or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"answer\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": row[2] or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"created_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": row[3].isoformat() if row[3] is not None else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            })\\\\\\\\n    except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\n        logger.warning(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"读取会话观测记录失败: %s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", e)\\\\\\\\n str(obs.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"observation_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip()\\\\\\\\n    if not observation_id:\\\\\\\\n        engine.dispose()\\\\\\\\n :used_cache, :pending_sql, :latency_ms,\\\\\\\\n                        :quality_label, :fallback_reason, :llm_model, :llm_endpoint_name, NOW()\\\\\\\\n                    )\\\\\\\\n ParseResult\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _get_embedding_model():\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"加载 BGE-M3 用于生成 chunk 向量（仅允许的 embedding 模型）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\n        from FlagEmbedding import FlagModel\\\\\\\\n        s = get_settings()\\\\\\\\n        return FlagModel(\\\\\\\\n            s.bge_embedding_model,\\\\\\\\n            use_fp16=False,\\\\\\\\n            device=s.embedding_device,\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n    except Exception:\\\\\\\\n        return None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass MilvusUploader:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    将确认后的解析结果（ParseResult）写入 Milvus：BGE-M3 编码 content/parent_content，\\\\\\\\n    写入 id、doc_id、chunk_id、content、parent_content、embedding；无 collection 时自动创建。\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self):\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"加载配置与 BGE-M3，并确保目标 collection 存在且已 load。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        self.settings = get_settings()\\\\\\\\n        self._embed = _get_embedding_model()\\\\\\\\n        self._collection = None\\\\\\\\n        self._ensure_collection()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _ensure_collection(self) -&gt; None:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"确保 Milvus 中已存在目标 collection（有则 load，无则创建并建 HNSW 索引）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\n            from pymilvus import connections, Collection, FieldSchema, CollectionSchema, DataType, utility\\\\\\\\n            connections.connect(uri=self.settings.milvus_uri)\\\\\\\\n            coll_name = self.settings.milvus_collection\\\\\\\\n            if utility.has_collection(coll_name):\\\\\\\\n                self._collection = Collection(coll_name)\\\\\\\\n                self._collection.load()\\\\\\\\n                return\\\\\\\\n            dim = self.settings.milvus_dim\\\\\\\\n            fields = [\\\\\\\\n                FieldSchema(name=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", dtype=DataType.VARCHAR, max_length=256, is_primary=True),\\\\\\\\n                FieldSchema(name=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"doc_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", dtype=DataType.VARCHAR, max_length=256),\\\\\\\\n                FieldSchema(name=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"chunk_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", dtype=DataType.VARCHAR, max_length=256),\\\\\\\\n                FieldSchema(name=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", dtype=DataType.VARCHAR, max_length=65535),\\\\\\\\n                FieldSchema(name=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"parent_content\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", dtype=DataType.VARCHAR, max_length=65535),\\\\\\\\n                FieldSchema(name=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"embedding\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", dtype=DataType.FLOAT_VECTOR, dim=dim),\\\\\\\\n            ]\\\\\\\\n            schema = CollectionSchema(fields=fields, description=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"kb chunks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            self._collection = Collection(name=coll_name, schema=schema)\\\\\\\\n            self._collection.create_index(\\\\\\\\n                field_name=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"embedding\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                index_params={\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"metric_type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"IP\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"index_type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"HNSW\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"params\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"M\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": 16, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"efConstruction\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": 256}},\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n            self._collection.load()\\\\\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\\\\\n            try:\\\\\\\\n                from pymilvus import connections, Collection\\\\\\\\n                connections.connect(uri=self.settings.milvus_uri)\\\\\\\\n                self._collection = Collection(self.settings.milvus_collection)\\\\\\\\n                self._collection.load()\\\\\\\\n            except Exception:\\\\\\\\n                self._collection = None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def upload_parse_result(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        parse_result: ParseResult,\\\\\\\\n        doc_id: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n    ) -&gt; int:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"将解析结果中的 chunks 向量化并写入 Milvus。返回写入条数。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        if self._collection is None or self._embed is None:\\\\\\\\n            return 0\\\\\\\\n        doc_id = doc_id or parse_result.task_id\\\\\\\\n        ids = []\\\\\\\\n        doc_ids = []\\\\\\\\n        chunk_ids = []\\\\\\\\n        contents = []\\\\\\\\n        parent_contents = []\\\\\\\\n        texts_to_embed = []\\\\\\\\n        for c in parse_result.chunks:\\\\\\\\n            chunk_id = c.chunk_id or f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{doc_id}_{len(ids)}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            ids.append(chunk_id)\\\\\\\\n            doc_ids.append(doc_id)\\\\\\\\n            chunk_ids.append(chunk_id)\\\\\\\\n            contents.append((c.content or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")[:65530])\\\\\\\\n            parent_contents.append((c.parent_content or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")[:65530])\\\\\\\\n            # 有父块时用「父块+子块」一起编码，提高检索上下文\\\\\\\\n            texts_to_embed.append((c.parent_content or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + (c.content or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") if c.parent_content else (c.content or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\n        if not texts_to_embed:\\\\\\\\n            return 0\\\\\\\\n        embeddings = self._embed.encode(texts_to_embed).tolist()\\\\\\\\n        entities = [ids, doc_ids, chunk_ids, contents, parent_contents, embeddings]\\\\\\\\n        self._collection.insert(entities)\\\\\\\\n        self._collection.flush()\\\\\\\\n        return None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass MilvusUploader:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    将确认后的解析结果（ParseResult）写入 Milvus：BGE-M3 编码 content/parent_content，\\\\\\\\n    写入 id、doc_id、chunk_id、content、parent_content、embedding；无 collection 时自动创建。\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self):\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"加载配置与 BGE-M3，并确保目标 collection 存在且已 load。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        self.settings = get_settings()\\\\\\\\n        self._embed = _get_embedding_model()\\\\\\\\n        self._collection = None\\\\\\\\n        self._ensure_collection()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _ensure_collection(self) -&gt; None:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"确保 Milvus 中已存在目标 collection（有则 load，无则创建并建 HNSW 索引）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\n            from pymilvus import connections, Collection, FieldSchema, CollectionSchema, DataType, utility\\\\\\\\n            connections.connect(uri=self.settings.milvus_uri)\\\\\\\\n            coll_name = self.settings.milvus_collection\\\\\\\\n            if utility.has_collection(coll_name):\\\\\\\\n                self._collection = Collection(coll_name)\\\\\\\\n                self._collection.load()\\\\\\\\n                return\\\\\\\\n            dim = self.settings.milvus_dim\\\\\\\\n            fields = [\\\\\\\\n                FieldSchema(name=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", dtype=DataType.VARCHAR, max_length=256, is_primary=True),\\\\\\\\n                FieldSchema(name=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"doc_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", dtype=DataType.VARCHAR, max_length=256),\\\\\\\\n                FieldSchema(name=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"chunk_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", dtype=DataType.VARCHAR, max_length=256),\\\\\\\\n                FieldSchema(name=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", dtype=DataType.VARCHAR, max_length=65535),\\\\\\\\n                FieldSchema(name=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"parent_content\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", dtype=DataType.VARCHAR, max_length=65535),\\\\\\\\n                FieldSchema(name=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"embedding\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", dtype=DataType.FLOAT_VECTOR, dim=dim),\\\\\\\\n            ]\\\\\\\\n            schema = CollectionSchema(fields=fields, description=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"kb chunks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            self._collection = Collection(name=coll_name, schema=schema)\\\\\\\\n            self._collection.create_index(\\\\\\\\n                field_name=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"embedding\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                index_params={\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"metric_type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"IP\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"index_type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"HNSW\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"params\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"M\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": 16, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"efConstruction\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": 256}},\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n            self._collection.load()\\\\\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\\\\\n            try:\\\\\\\\n                from pymilvus import connections, Collection\\\\\\\\n                connections.connect(uri=self.settings.milvus_uri)\\\\\\\\n                self._collection = Collection(self.settings.milvus_collection)\\\\\\\\n                self._collection.load()\\\\\\\\n            except Exception:\\\\\\\\n                self._collection = None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def upload_parse_result(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        parse_result: ParseResult,\\\\\\\\n        doc_id: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n    ) -&gt; int:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"将解析结果中的 chunks 向量化并写入 Milvus。返回写入条数。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        if self._collection is None or self._embed is None:\\\\\\\\n            return 0\\\\\\\\n        doc_id = doc_id or parse_result.task_id\\\\\\\\n        ids = []\\\\\\\\n        doc_ids = []\\\\\\\\n        chunk_ids = []\\\\\\\\n        contents = []\\\\\\\\n        parent_contents = []\\\\\\\\n        texts_to_embed = []\\\\\\\\n        for c in parse_result.chunks:\\\\\\\\n            chunk_id = c.chunk_id or f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{doc_id}_{len(ids)}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            ids.append(chunk_id)\\\\\\\\n            doc_ids.append(doc_id)\\\\\\\\n            chunk_ids.append(chunk_id)\\\\\\\\n            contents.append((c.content or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")[:65530])\\\\\\\\n            parent_contents.append((c.parent_content or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")[:65530])\\\\\\\\n            # 有父块时用「父块+子块」一起编码，提高检索上下文\\\\\\\\n            texts_to_embed.append((c.parent_content or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + (c.content or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") if c.parent_content else (c.content or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\n        if not texts_to_embed:\\\\\\\\n            return 0\\\\\\\\n        embeddings = self._embed.encode(texts_to_embed).tolist()\\\\\\\\n        entities = [ids, doc_ids, chunk_ids, contents, parent_contents, embeddings]\\\\\\\\n        self._collection.insert(entities)\\\\\\\\n        self._collection.flush()\\\\\\\\n        return src/doc/mineru_client.py\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n文档解析：对接 MinerU，基础版支持占位实现与真实 MinerU API 调用。\\\\\\\\n占位实现使用 kb.chunking 做父子切片（可配置切块大小、父块重叠约 150），不调用任何大模型或 OpenAI。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nimport os\\\\\\\\nimport uuid\\\\\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import List, Optional\\\\\\\\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom config import get_settings\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass ChunkItem(BaseModel):\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"单段解析内容（子块），可选 parent_content 用于父子分段。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    content: str\\\\\\\\n    parent_content: Optional[str] = None\\\\\\\\n    chunk_id: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass ParseResult(BaseModel):\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"解析结果：任务 id、原始路径、全文、分段 chunks，供前端对比与自定义后上传 Milvus。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    task_id: str\\\\\\\\n    original_path: str\\\\\\\\n    full_text: str\\\\\\\\n    chunks: List[ChunkItem] = []\\\\\\\\n    raw_markdown: Optional[str] = None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass MinerUClient:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    文档解析客户端：mineru_use_local 或无 API 时用占位（chunking 父子切片）；\\\\\\\\n    有 mineru_api_url + mineru_api_token 时调用远程 MinerU API。\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self):\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"从 config 读取 mineru_use_local、mineru_api_url、mineru_api_token 等。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        self.settings = get_settings()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def parse_file(self, file_path: str, file_bytes: Optional[bytes] = None) -&gt; ParseResult:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"解析单个文档；file_path 为原始文件名，file_bytes 可选（上传内容）。返回 task_id、全文、chunks。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        task_id = str(uuid.uuid4())\\\\\\\\n        original_path = file_path or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        if self.settings.mineru_use_local and not self.settings.mineru_api_url:\\\\\\\\n            return self._parse_placeholder(task_id, original_path, file_bytes)\\\\\\\\n        if self.settings.mineru_api_url and self.settings.mineru_api_token:\\\\\\\\n            return self._parse_via_api(task_id, original_path, file_bytes)\\\\\\\\n        return self._parse_placeholder(task_id, original_path, file_bytes)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _parse_placeholder(\\\\\\\\n        self, task_id: str, original_path: str, file_bytes: Optional[bytes]\\\\\\\\n    ) -&gt; ParseResult:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"占位实现：优先使用父子切片（可配置大小、父块重叠约 150），否则按行/段切。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        if file_bytes:\\\\\\\\n            try:\\\\\\\\n                full_text = file_bytes.decode(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", errors=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"replace\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            except Exception:\\\\\\\\n                full_text = file_bytes.decode(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"latin-1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", errors=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"replace\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        else:\\\\\\\\n            p = Path(original_path)\\\\\\\\n            if p.exists():\\\\\\\\n                full_text = p.read_text(encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", errors=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"replace\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            else:\\\\\\\\n                full_text = f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"[占位] 未读取到文件内容: {original_path}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n请配置 MinerU 或上传文件内容。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        chunks = self._chunk_with_strategy(task_id, full_text)\\\\\\\\n        return ParseResult(\\\\\\\\n            task_id=task_id,\\\\\\\\n            original_path=original_path,\\\\\\\\n            full_text=full_text,\\\\\\\\n            chunks=chunks,\\\\\\\\n            raw_markdown=full_text,\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _chunk_with_strategy(self, task_id: str, full_text: str) -&gt; List[ChunkItem]:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"使用配置的切块大小与父块重叠（约 150）做父子切片。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\n            from src.kb.chunking import chunk_text\\\\\\\\n            chunk_size = getattr(self.settings, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"rag_default_chunk_size\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", 512)\\\\\\\\n            parent_overlap = getattr(self.settings, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"rag_parent_overlap\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", 150)\\\\\\\\n            parent_ctx = min(chunk_size * 2, 768)\\\\\\\\n            with_parent = chunk_text(\\\\\\\\n                full_text,\\\\\\\\n                child_chunk_size=chunk_size,\\\\\\\\n                parent_overlap=parent_overlap,\\\\\\\\n                parent_ctx_len=parent_ctx,\\\\\\\\n                doc_id=task_id,\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n            return [\\\\\\\\n                ChunkItem(\\\\\\\\n                    content=c.content,\\\\\\\\n                    parent_content=c.parent_content or None,\\\\\\\\n                    chunk_id=c.chunk_id,\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n                for c in with_parent\\\\\\\\n            ]\\\\\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\\\\\n            pass\\\\\\\\n        # 占位兜底：按行/空行与长度切块，无父子结构\\\\\\\\n        raw_lines = full_text.splitlines()\\\\\\\\n        chunks: List[ChunkItem] = []\\\\\\\\n        current: List[str] = []\\\\\\\\n        for line in raw_lines:\\\\\\\\n            current.append(line)\\\\\\\\n            if line.strip() == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" or len(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(current)) &gt; 500:\\\\\\\\n                block = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(current).strip()\\\\\\\\n                if block:\\\\\\\\n                    chunks.append(\\\\\\\\n                        ChunkItem(\\\\\\\\n                            content=block,\\\\\\\\n                            parent_content=None,\\\\\\\\n                            chunk_id=f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{task_id}_{len(chunks)}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                        )\\\\\\\\n                    )\\\\\\\\n                current = []\\\\\\\\n        if current:\\\\\\\\n            block = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(current).strip()\\\\\\\\n            if block:\\\\\\\\n                chunks.append(\\\\\\\\n                    ChunkItem(\\\\\\\\n                        content=block,\\\\\\\\n                        parent_content=None,\\\\\\\\n                        chunk_id=f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{task_id}_{len(chunks)}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                    )\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n        if not chunks:\\\\\\\\n            chunks = [\\\\\\\\n                ChunkItem(\\\\\\\\n                    content=full_text[:2000] or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"(无内容)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                    chunk_id=f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{task_id}_0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n            ]\\\\\\\\n        return chunks\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _parse_via_api(\\\\\\\\n        self, task_id: str, original_path: str, file_bytes: Optional[bytes]\\\\\\\\n    ) -&gt; ParseResult:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"调用 MinerU 云 API（需上传文件到可访问 URL 或使用 API 支持的方式）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        import requests\\\\\\\\n        url = self.settings.mineru_api_url\\\\\\\\n        headers = {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Authorization\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Bearer {self.settings.mineru_api_token}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}\\\\\\\\n        # 若 API 接受 file_url，可先传文件到存储再传 URL；这里简化\\\\\\\\n        if file_bytes:\\\\\\\\n            files = {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"file\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": (Path(original_path).name, file_bytes)}\\\\\\\\n            r = requests.post(url, headers=headers, files=files, timeout=120)\\\\\\\\n        else:\\\\\\\\n            r = requests.post(\\\\\\\\n                url,\\\\\\\\n                headers=headers,\\\\\\\\n                json={\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": original_path},\\\\\\\\n                timeout=120,\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n        if r.status_code != 200:\\\\\\\\n            # API 失败时回退到占位解析，避免直接报错\\\\\\\\n            return self._parse_placeholder(\\\\\\\\n                task_id, original_path, r.content[:5000] if r.content else None\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n        data = r.json()\\\\\\\\n        full_text = data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"markdown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        chunks = []\\\\\\\\n        for i, seg in enumerate(data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"chunks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", []) or [full_text]):\\\\\\\\n            if isinstance(seg, dict):\\\\\\\\n                content = seg.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or seg.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                parent = seg.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"parent_content\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            else:\\\\\\\\n                content = str(seg)\\\\\\\\n                parent = None\\\\\\\\n            chunks.append(\\\\\\\\n                ChunkItem(\\\\\\\\n                    content=content,\\\\\\\\n                    parent_content=parent,\\\\\\\\n                    chunk_id=f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{task_id}_{i}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n        if not chunks and full_text:\\\\\\\\n            chunks = [ChunkItem(content=full_text[:2000], chunk_id=f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{task_id}_0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")]\\\\\\\\n        return ParseResult(\\\\\\\\n            task_id=task_id,\\\\\\\\n            original_path=original_path,\\\\\\\\n            full_text=full_text,\\\\\\\\n            chunks=chunks,\\\\\\\\n            raw_markdown=full_text,\\\\\\\\n parent_content=c.parent_content or None,\\\\\\\\n                    chunk_id=c.chunk_id,\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n                for c in with_parent\\\\\\\\n            ]\\\\\\\\n current: List[str] = []\\\\\\\\n        for line in raw_lines:\\\\\\\\n            current.append(line)\\\\\\\\n            if line.strip() == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" or len(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(current)) &gt; 500:\\\\\\\\n                block = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(current).strip()\\\\\\\\n                if parent_content=None,\\\\\\\\n                            chunk_id=f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{task_id}_{len(chunks)}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                        )\\\\\\\\n                    )\\\\\\\\n task_id: str, original_path: str, file_bytes: Optional[bytes]\\\\\\\\n    ) -&gt; ParseResult:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"调用 MinerU 云 API（需上传文件到可访问 URL 或使用 API {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Authorization\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Bearer {self.settings.mineru_api_token}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}\\\\\\\\n        # 若 API 接受 file_url，可先传文件到存储再传 URL；这里简化\\\\\\\\n        if src/kb/schema_loader.py\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n数据库 Schema 读取与定时检测：为 Text2SQL 提供表结构、字段含义、表间关联。\\\\\\\\n- 读取数据库表结构（表名、列名、类型、含义）；\\\\\\\\n- 定时（默认 1 小时）检测 schema 是否变更，有变更则重新扫描；\\\\\\\\n- 支持从 JSON 文件加载/保存人工审核的表/列含义及表间关联（仅人工整理的关联会喂给大模型）。\\\\\\\\n不调用任何大模型，仅与数据库交互。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nimport hashlib\\\\\\\\nimport json\\\\\\\\nimport os\\\\\\\\nimport time\\\\\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\\\\\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import List, Optional, Tuple, Any\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom config import get_settings\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\nclass ColumnInfo:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"列信息：名称、类型、含义（可选，来自注释或配置）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    name: str\\\\\\\\n    dtype: str\\\\\\\\n    comment: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\nclass TableInfo:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"表信息：表名、列列表、表含义（可选）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    name: str\\\\\\\\n    columns: List[ColumnInfo]\\\\\\\\n    comment: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\nclass TableRelation:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"表间关联：左表.左列 = 右表.右列，用于 JOIN，避免笛卡尔积。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    left_table: str\\\\\\\\n    left_column: str\\\\\\\\n    right_table: str\\\\\\\\n    right_column: str\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _get_uri() -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n    return get_settings().text2sql_database_uri\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef read_db_schema(\\\\\\\\n    database_uri: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n    table_comments: Optional[dict[str, str]] = None,\\\\\\\\n    column_comments: Optional[dict[str, dict[str, str]]] = None,\\\\\\\\n) -&gt; Tuple[List[TableInfo], str]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    从数据库读取表结构：表名、列名、类型。\\\\\\\\n    table_comments: { \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"表名\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"含义\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" }\\\\\\\\n    column_comments: { \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"表名\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": { \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"列名\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"含义\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" } }\\\\\\\\n    返回 (TableInfo 列表, schema 文本描述)。\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    from sqlalchemy import create_engine, inspect\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    uri = database_uri or _get_uri()\\\\\\\\n    table_comments = table_comments or {}\\\\\\\\n    column_comments = column_comments or {}\\\\\\\\n    engine = create_engine(uri)\\\\\\\\n    inspector = inspect(engine)\\\\\\\\n    tables = inspector.get_table_names()\\\\\\\\n    result: List[TableInfo] = []\\\\\\\\n    for t in tables:\\\\\\\\n        cols = inspector.get_columns(t)\\\\\\\\n        col_infos = [\\\\\\\\n            ColumnInfo(\\\\\\\\n                name=c[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"],\\\\\\\\n                dtype=str(c.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")),\\\\\\\\n                comment=column_comments.get(t, {}).get(c[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"], \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n            for c in cols\\\\\\\\n        ]\\\\\\\\n        result.append(\\\\\\\\n            TableInfo(\\\\\\\\n                name=t,\\\\\\\\n                columns=col_infos,\\\\\\\\n                comment=table_comments.get(t, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n    schema_text = _format_schema_for_llm(result, []) if result else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"（当前数据库无表或无法读取表结构）\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    return result, schema_text\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef get_table_relations(\\\\\\\\n    database_uri: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n    extra_relations: Optional[List[TableRelation]] = None,\\\\\\\\n    use_fk: bool = True,\\\\\\\\n) -&gt; List[TableRelation]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    获取表间关联。use_fk=True 时从外键推断并与 extra_relations 合并；\\\\\\\\n    use_fk=False 时仅返回 extra_relations（人工整理的关联，高效喂给大模型）。\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    relations: List[TableRelation] = []\\\\\\\\n    if use_fk:\\\\\\\\n        from sqlalchemy import create_engine, inspect\\\\\\\\n        uri = database_uri or _get_uri()\\\\\\\\n        engine = create_engine(uri)\\\\\\\\n        inspector = inspect(engine)\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\n            for t in inspector.get_table_names():\\\\\\\\n                fks = inspector.get_foreign_keys(t)\\\\\\\\n                for fk in fks:\\\\\\\\n                    for lcol, rcol in zip(fk.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"constrained_columns\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", []), fk.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"referred_columns\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", [])):\\\\\\\\n                        ref_table = fk.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"referred_table\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n                        if ref_table:\\\\\\\\n                            relations.append(\\\\\\\\n                                TableRelation(left_table=t, left_column=lcol, right_table=ref_table, right_column=rcol)\\\\\\\\n                            )\\\\\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\\\\\n            pass\\\\\\\\n    if extra_relations:\\\\\\\\n        relations = list(extra_relations) + relations\\\\\\\\n    return relations\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _format_schema_for_llm(tables: List[TableInfo], relations: List[TableRelation]) -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"格式化为大模型可读的 schema 描述（含表/列含义、表间关联）。该字符串会原样作为 prompt 中的 schema_block 喂给大模型。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    if not tables:\\\\\\\\n        return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"（当前数据库无表或无法读取表结构）\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    lines = []\\\\\\\\n    for t in tables:\\\\\\\\n        head = f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"表名: {t.name}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        if t.comment:\\\\\\\\n            head += f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"  # {t.comment}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        lines.append(head)\\\\\\\\n        for c in t.columns:\\\\\\\\n            part = f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"  - {c.name} ({c.dtype})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            if c.comment:\\\\\\\\n                part += f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {c.comment}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            lines.append(part)\\\\\\\\n        lines.append(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    if relations:\\\\\\\\n        lines.append(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"表间关联（多表查询时必须用以下条件 JOIN，严禁笛卡尔积）：\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        for r in relations:\\\\\\\\n            lines.append(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"  - {r.left_table}.{r.left_column} = {r.right_table}.{r.right_column}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        lines.append(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(lines).strip()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef get_schema_with_relations(\\\\\\\\n    database_uri: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n    table_comments: Optional[dict] = None,\\\\\\\\n    column_comments: Optional[dict] = None,\\\\\\\\n    extra_relations: Optional[List[TableRelation]] = None,\\\\\\\\n    relations_from_human_only: bool = False,\\\\\\\\n) -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    一次性获取「表结构 + 表间关联」的完整 schema 文本，供 LLM 使用。\\\\\\\\n    relations_from_human_only=True 时仅使用 extra_relations，不再从外键推断（人工整理关联喂给大模型）。\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    uri = database_uri or _get_uri()\\\\\\\\n    tables, _ = read_db_schema(uri, table_comments, column_comments)\\\\\\\\n    relations = get_table_relations(uri, extra_relations, use_fk=not relations_from_human_only)\\\\\\\\n    return _format_schema_for_llm(tables, relations)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# ---------- 人工审核的 schema 覆盖：表/列含义、表间关联（JSON 持久化） ----------\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _overrides_path() -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"人工审核 JSON 路径（表/列含义、表间关联）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    return get_settings().text2sql_schema_overrides_path\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef load_schema_overrides(path: Optional[str] = None) -&gt; dict:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    从 JSON 文件加载人工审核的表含义、列含义、表间关联。\\\\\\\\n    返回 { \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"table_comments\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {}, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"column_comments\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {}, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"relations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [ { \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"left_table\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"left_column\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"right_table\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"right_column\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" } ] }\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    p = Path(path or _overrides_path())\\\\\\\\n    if not p.exists():\\\\\\\\n        return {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"table_comments\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {}, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"column_comments\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {}, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"relations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": []}\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\n        with open(p, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") as f:\\\\\\\\n            data = json.load(f)\\\\\\\\n        return {\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"table_comments\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"table_comments\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or {},\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"column_comments\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"column_comments\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or {},\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"relations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"relations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or [],\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n    except Exception:\\\\\\\\n        return {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"table_comments\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {}, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"column_comments\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {}, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"relations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": []}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef save_schema_overrides(\\\\\\\\n    table_comments: dict,\\\\\\\\n    column_comments: dict,\\\\\\\\n    relations: List[dict],\\\\\\\\n    path: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n) -&gt; None:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"将人工审核的表/列含义及表间关联写入 JSON 文件。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    p = Path(path or _overrides_path())\\\\\\\\n    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\\\\\n    with open(p, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"w\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") as f:\\\\\\\\n        json.dump(\\\\\\\\n            {\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"table_comments\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": table_comments,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"column_comments\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": column_comments,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"relations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": relations,\\\\\\\\n            },\\\\\\\\n            f,\\\\\\\\n            ensure_ascii=False,\\\\\\\\n            indent=2,\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef overrides_to_relations(relations: List[dict]) -&gt; List[TableRelation]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"将 JSON 中的 relations 转为 TableRelation 列表。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    out: List[TableRelation] = []\\\\\\\\n    for r in relations:\\\\\\\\n        if isinstance(r, dict) and all(k in r for k in (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"left_table\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"left_column\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"right_table\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"right_column\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")):\\\\\\\\n            out.append(\\\\\\\\n                TableRelation(\\\\\\\\n                    left_table=str(r[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"left_table\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]),\\\\\\\\n                    left_column=str(r[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"left_column\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]),\\\\\\\\n                    right_table=str(r[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"right_table\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]),\\\\\\\\n                    right_column=str(r[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"right_column\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]),\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n    return out\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass SchemaCache:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    带定时刷新的 Schema 缓存：首次读取 DB 结构，之后每 N 秒检测是否变更（通过表列表+列信息的哈希），\\\\\\\\n    有变更则重新扫描。若提供 overrides_path，每次刷新时从该 JSON 加载人工审核的表/列含义及表间关联，\\\\\\\\n    且表间关联仅使用人工整理的内容喂给大模型（不再从外键推断）。\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        refresh_interval_seconds: Optional[int] = None,\\\\\\\\n        overrides_path: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n    ):\\\\\\\\n        self._interval = refresh_interval_seconds or get_settings().text2sql_schema_refresh_interval_seconds\\\\\\\\n        self._overrides_path = overrides_path or get_settings().text2sql_schema_overrides_path\\\\\\\\n        self._schema_text = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        self._last_hash: Optional[str] = None\\\\\\\\n        self._last_refresh = 0.0\\\\\\\\n        self._table_comments: Optional[dict] = None\\\\\\\\n        self._column_comments: Optional[dict] = None\\\\\\\\n        self._extra_relations: Optional[List[TableRelation]] = None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def set_comment_overrides(\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\n        table_comments: Optional[dict[str, str]] = None,\\\\\\\\n        column_comments: Optional[dict[str, dict[str, str]]] = None,\\\\\\\\n    ) -&gt; None:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"设置表/列含义（覆盖或补充从 DB 读到的）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        self._table_comments = table_comments\\\\\\\\n        self._column_comments = column_comments\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def set_extra_relations(self, relations: List[TableRelation]) -&gt; None:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"设置额外表间关联（如无外键时手动指定）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        self._extra_relations = relations\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":311}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/nanqi/Desktop/常用文件/rag_code_rewritebyai/src/kb/schema_loader.py\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"offset\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"limit\\\\\\\":260},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# json\\\\\\\\nimport os\\\\\\\\nimport time\\\\\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\\\\\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import List, Optional, Tuple, Any\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom config import get_settings\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\nclass ColumnInfo:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"列信息：名称、类型、含义（可选，来自注释或配置）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    name: str\\\\\\\\n    dtype: str\\\\\\\\n    comment: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\nclass TableInfo:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"表信息：表名、列列表、表含义（可选）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    name: str\\\\\\\\n    columns: List[ColumnInfo]\\\\\\\\n    comment: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\nclass TableRelation:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"表间关联：左表.左列 = 右表.右列，用于 JOIN，避免笛卡尔积。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    left_table: str\\\\\\\\n    left_column: str\\\\\\\\n    right_table: str\\\\\\\\n    right_column: str\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _get_uri() -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n    return get_settings().text2sql_database_uri\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef read_db_schema(\\\\\\\\n    database_uri: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n    table_comments: Optional[dict[str, str]] = None,\\\\\\\\n    column_comments: Optional[dict[str, dict[str, str]]] = None,\\\\\\\\n) -&gt; Tuple[List[TableInfo], str]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    从数据库读取表结构：表名、列名、类型。\\\\\\\\n    table_comments: { \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"表名\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"含义\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" }\\\\\\\\n    column_comments: { \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"表名\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": { \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"列名\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"含义\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" } }\\\\\\\\n    返回 (TableInfo 列表, schema 文本描述)。\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    from sqlalchemy import create_engine, inspect\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    uri = database_uri or _get_uri()\\\\\\\\n    table_comments = table_comments or {}\\\\\\\\n    column_comments = column_comments or {}\\\\\\\\n    engine = create_engine(uri)\\\\\\\\n    inspector = inspect(engine)\\\\\\\\n    tables = inspector.get_table_names()\\\\\\\\n    result: List[TableInfo] = []\\\\\\\\n    for t in tables:\\\\\\\\n        cols = inspector.get_columns(t)\\\\\\\\n        col_infos = [\\\\\\\\n            ColumnInfo(\\\\\\\\n                name=c[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"],\\\\\\\\n                dtype=str(c.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")),\\\\\\\\n                comment=column_comments.get(t, {}).get(c[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"], \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n            for c in cols\\\\\\\\n        ]\\\\\\\\n        result.append(\\\\\\\\n            TableInfo(\\\\\\\\n                name=t,\\\\\\\\n                columns=col_infos,\\\\\\\\n                comment=table_comments.get(t, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n    schema_text = _format_schema_for_llm(result, []) if result else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"（当前数据库无表或无法读取表结构）\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    return result, schema_text\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef get_table_relations(\\\\\\\\n    database_uri: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n    extra_relations: Optional[List[TableRelation]] = None,\\\\\\\\n    use_fk: bool = True,\\\\\\\\n) -&gt; List[TableRelation]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    获取表间关联。use_fk=True 时从外键推断并与 extra_relations 合并；\\\\\\\\n    use_fk=False 时仅返回 extra_relations（人工整理的关联，高效喂给大模型）。\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    relations: List[TableRelation] = []\\\\\\\\n    if use_fk:\\\\\\\\n        from sqlalchemy import create_engine, inspect\\\\\\\\n        uri = database_uri or _get_uri()\\\\\\\\n        engine = create_engine(uri)\\\\\\\\n        inspector = inspect(engine)\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\n            for t in inspector.get_table_names():\\\\\\\\n                fks = inspector.get_foreign_keys(t)\\\\\\\\n                for fk in fks:\\\\\\\\n                    for lcol, rcol in zip(fk.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"constrained_columns\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", []), fk.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"referred_columns\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", [])):\\\\\\\\n                        ref_table = fk.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"referred_table\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n                        if ref_table:\\\\\\\\n                            relations.append(\\\\\\\\n                                TableRelation(left_table=t, left_column=lcol, right_table=ref_table, right_column=rcol)\\\\\\\\n                            )\\\\\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\\\\\n            pass\\\\\\\\n    if extra_relations:\\\\\\\\n        relations = list(extra_relations) + relations\\\\\\\\n    return relations\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _format_schema_for_llm(tables: List[TableInfo], relations: List[TableRelation]) -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"格式化为大模型可读的 schema 描述（含表/列含义、表间关联）。该字符串会原样作为 prompt 中的 schema_block 喂给大模型。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    if not tables:\\\\\\\\n        return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"（当前数据库无表或无法读取表结构）\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    lines = []\\\\\\\\n    for t in tables:\\\\\\\\n        head = f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"表名: {t.name}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        if t.comment:\\\\\\\\n            head += f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"  # {t.comment}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        lines.append(head)\\\\\\\\n        for c in t.columns:\\\\\\\\n            part = f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"  - {c.name} ({c.dtype})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            if c.comment:\\\\\\\\n                part += f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {c.comment}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            lines.append(part)\\\\\\\\n        lines.append(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    if relations:\\\\\\\\n        lines.append(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"表间关联（多表查询时必须用以下条件 JOIN，严禁笛卡尔积）：\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        for r in relations:\\\\\\\\n            lines.append(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"  - {r.left_table}.{r.left_column} = {r.right_table}.{r.right_column}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        lines.append(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(lines).strip()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef get_schema_with_relations(\\\\\\\\n    database_uri: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n    table_comments: Optional[dict] = None,\\\\\\\\n    column_comments: Optional[dict] = None,\\\\\\\\n    extra_relations: Optional[List[TableRelation]] = None,\\\\\\\\n    relations_from_human_only: bool = False,\\\\\\\\n) -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    一次性获取「表结构 + 表间关联」的完整 schema 文本，供 LLM 使用。\\\\\\\\n    relations_from_human_only=True 时仅使用 extra_relations，不再从外键推断（人工整理关联喂给大模型）。\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    uri = database_uri or _get_uri()\\\\\\\\n    tables, _ = read_db_schema(uri, table_comments, column_comments)\\\\\\\\n    relations = get_table_relations(uri, extra_relations, use_fk=not relations_from_human_only)\\\\\\\\n    return _format_schema_for_llm(tables, relations)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# ---------- 人工审核的 schema 覆盖：表/列含义、表间关联（JSON 持久化） ----------\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _overrides_path() -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"人工审核 JSON 路径（表/列含义、表间关联）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    return get_settings().text2sql_schema_overrides_path\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef load_schema_overrides(path: Optional[str] = None) -&gt; dict:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    从 JSON 文件加载人工审核的表含义、列含义、表间关联。\\\\\\\\n    返回 { \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"table_comments\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {}, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"column_comments\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {}, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"relations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [ { \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"left_table\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"left_column\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"right_table\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"right_column\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" } ] }\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    p = Path(path or _overrides_path())\\\\\\\\n    if not p.exists():\\\\\\\\n        return {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"table_comments\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {}, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"column_comments\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {}, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"relations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": []}\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\n        with open(p, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") as f:\\\\\\\\n            data = json.load(f)\\\\\\\\n        return {\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"table_comments\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"table_comments\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or {},\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"column_comments\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"column_comments\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or {},\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"relations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"relations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or [],\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n    except Exception:\\\\\\\\n        return {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"table_comments\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {}, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"column_comments\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {}, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"relations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": []}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef save_schema_overrides(\\\\\\\\n    table_comments: dict,\\\\\\\\n    column_comments: dict,\\\\\\\\n    relations: List[dict],\\\\\\\\n    path: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\n) -&gt; None:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"将人工审核的表/列含义及表间关联写入 JSON 文件。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    p = Path(path or _overrides_path())\\\\\\\\n    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\\\\\n    with open(p, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"w\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") as f:\\\\\\\\n        json.dump(\\\\\\\\n            {\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"table_comments\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": table_comments,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"column_comments\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": column_comments,\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"relations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": relations,\\\\\\\\n            },\\\\\\\\n            f,\\\\\\\\n            ensure_ascii=False,\\\\\\\\n            indent=2,\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef overrides_to_relations(relations: List[dict]) -&gt; List[TableRelation]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"将 JSON 中的 relations 转为 TableRelation 列表。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    out: List[TableRelation] = []\\\\\\\\n    for r in relations:\\\\\\\\n        if isinstance(r, dict) and all(k in r for k in (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"left_table\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"left_column\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"right_table\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"right_column\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")):\\\\\\\\n            out.append(\\\\\\\\n                TableRelation(\\\\\\\\n                    left_table=str(r[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"left_table\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]),\\\\\\\\n                    left_column=str(r[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"left_column\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]),\\\\\\\\n                    right_table=str(r[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"right_table\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]),\\\\\\\\n                    right_column=str(r[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"right_column\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]),\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n    return out\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass SchemaCache:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    带定时刷新的 Schema 缓存：首次读取 DB 结构，之后每 N 秒检测是否变更（通过表列表+列信息的哈希），\\\\\\\\n    有变更则重新扫描。若提供 overrides_path，每次刷新时从该 JSON 加载人工审核的表/列含义及表间关联，\\\\\\\\n get_settings().text2sql_schema_refresh_interval_seconds\\\\\\\\n        self._overrides_path = overrides_path or get_settings().text2sql_schema_overrides_path\\\\\\\\n        self._schema_text = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        self._last_hash: Optional[str] = None\\\\\\\\n        self._last_refresh = 0.0\\\\\\\\n        self._table_comments: Optional[dict] = None\\\\\\\\n self,\\\\\\\\n        table_comments: Optional[dict[str, str]] = None,\\\\\\\\n        column_comments: Optional[dict[str, dict[str, str]]] = None,\\\\\\\\n    ) -&gt; None:\\\\\\\\n src/kb/chunking.py\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n切片策略：支持多种切块大小验证、父块约 150 字重叠。\\\\\\\\n用于上传解析与 RAG 索引时的父子分段，不涉及任何模型调用。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import List, Tuple, Optional\\\\\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\nclass ChunkWithParent:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"单个子块及其对应的父块内容（父块用于提供上下文，相邻父块重叠约 150 字）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    content: str\\\\\\\\n    parent_content: str\\\\\\\\n    chunk_id: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# 可验证的切块大小（字符数），便于对比不同策略效果\\\\\\\\nDEFAULT_CHUNK_SIZES = (256, 384, 512, 768)\\\\\\\\nDEFAULT_PARENT_OVERLAP = 150\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _slide_windows(text: str, size: int, overlap: int) -&gt; List[Tuple[int, int]]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"滑动窗口 (start, end) 字符区间，overlap 为重叠长度。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    if not text or size &lt;= 0:\\\\\\\\n        return []\\\\\\\\n    step = max(1, size - overlap)\\\\\\\\n    spans: List[Tuple[int, int]] = []\\\\\\\\n    start = 0\\\\\\\\n    while start &lt; len(text):\\\\\\\\n        end = min(start + size, len(text))\\\\\\\\n        spans.append((start, end))\\\\\\\\n        if end &gt;= len(text):\\\\\\\\n            break\\\\\\\\n        start = end - overlap\\\\\\\\n    return spans\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef chunk_text(\\\\\\\\n    full_text: str,\\\\\\\\n    child_chunk_size: int = 256,\\\\\\\\n    parent_overlap: int = 150,\\\\\\\\n    parent_ctx_len: int = 1024,\\\\\\\\n    doc_id: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n) -&gt; List[ChunkWithParent]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    对全文做父子切片：子块固定长度；父块为子块上下文，相邻父块重叠约 parent_overlap 字。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    - child_chunk_size: 子块长度（字符）\\\\\\\\n    - parent_overlap: 父块之间重叠长度（约 150）\\\\\\\\n    - parent_ctx_len: 每个子块对应的父块长度（用于提供上下文）\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    text = full_text.strip()\\\\\\\\n    if not text:\\\\\\\\n        return []\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    # 子块：按 child_chunk_size 切，无重叠（或可设子块重叠，这里先不设）\\\\\\\\n    child_spans = _slide_windows(text, child_chunk_size, 0)\\\\\\\\n    if not child_spans:\\\\\\\\n        return [ChunkWithParent(content=text, parent_content=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", chunk_id=f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{doc_id}_0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    step = max(1, parent_ctx_len - parent_overlap)\\\\\\\\n    result: List[ChunkWithParent] = []\\\\\\\\n    for i, (cs, ce) in enumerate(child_spans):\\\\\\\\n        child_content = text[cs:ce]\\\\\\\\n        # 父块：以当前子块为中心，向前取 parent_ctx_len，与前一父块重叠 parent_overlap\\\\\\\\n        parent_start = max(0, cs - (parent_ctx_len - parent_overlap))\\\\\\\\n        parent_end = min(len(text), parent_start + parent_ctx_len)\\\\\\\\n        parent_content = text[parent_start:parent_end]\\\\\\\\n        result.append(\\\\\\\\n            ChunkWithParent(\\\\\\\\n                content=child_content,\\\\\\\\n                parent_content=parent_content,\\\\\\\\n                chunk_id=f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{doc_id}_{i}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if doc_id else str(i),\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n    return result\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef chunk_text_multi_size(\\\\\\\\n    full_text: str,\\\\\\\\n    chunk_sizes: Tuple[int, ...] = DEFAULT_CHUNK_SIZES,\\\\\\\\n    parent_overlap: int = DEFAULT_PARENT_OVERLAP,\\\\\\\\n    parent_ctx_len: Optional[int] = None,\\\\\\\\n    doc_id: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n) -&gt; dict[int, List[ChunkWithParent]]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    用多种切块大小分别切片，便于验证不同 size 的效果。\\\\\\\\n    返回: { chunk_size -&gt; [ChunkWithParent, ...] }\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    out: dict[int, List[ChunkWithParent]] = {}\\\\\\\\n    for size in chunk_sizes:\\\\\\\\n        parent_len = parent_ctx_len or min(size * 2, 768)\\\\\\\\n        out[size] = chunk_text(\\\\\\\\n            full_text,\\\\\\\\n            child_chunk_size=size,\\\\\\\\n            parent_overlap=parent_overlap,\\\\\\\\n            parent_ctx_len=parent_len,\\\\\\\\n            doc_id=f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{doc_id}_s{size}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if doc_id else f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"s{size}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n    return out\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":102}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/nanqi/Desktop/常用文件/rag_code_rewritebyai/src/kb/chunking.py\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# src/kb/chunking.py\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n切片策略：支持多种切块大小验证、父块约 150 字重叠。\\\\\\\\n用于上传解析与 RAG 索引时的父子分段，不涉及任何模型调用。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import List, Tuple, Optional\\\\\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\nclass ChunkWithParent:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"单个子块及其对应的父块内容（父块用于提供上下文，相邻父块重叠约 150 字）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    content: str\\\\\\\\n    parent_content: str\\\\\\\\n    chunk_id: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# 可验证的切块大小（字符数），便于对比不同策略效果\\\\\\\\nDEFAULT_CHUNK_SIZES = (256, 384, 512, 768)\\\\\\\\nDEFAULT_PARENT_OVERLAP = 150\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _slide_windows(text: str, size: int, overlap: int) -&gt; List[Tuple[int, int]]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"滑动窗口 (start, end) 字符区间，overlap 为重叠长度。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    if not text or size &lt;= 0:\\\\\\\\n        return []\\\\\\\\n    step = max(1, size - overlap)\\\\\\\\n    spans: List[Tuple[int, int]] = []\\\\\\\\n    start = 0\\\\\\\\n    while start &lt; len(text):\\\\\\\\n        end = min(start + size, len(text))\\\\\\\\n        spans.append((start, end))\\\\\\\\n        if end &gt;= len(text):\\\\\\\\n            break\\\\\\\\n        start = end - overlap\\\\\\\\n    return spans\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef chunk_text(\\\\\\\\n    full_text: str,\\\\\\\\n    child_chunk_size: int = 256,\\\\\\\\n    parent_overlap: int = 150,\\\\\\\\n    parent_ctx_len: int = 1024,\\\\\\\\n    doc_id: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n) -&gt; List[ChunkWithParent]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    对全文做父子切片：子块固定长度；父块为子块上下文，相邻父块重叠约 parent_overlap 字。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    - child_chunk_size: 子块长度（字符）\\\\\\\\n    - parent_overlap: 父块之间重叠长度（约 150）\\\\\\\\n    - parent_ctx_len: 每个子块对应的父块长度（用于提供上下文）\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    text = full_text.strip()\\\\\\\\n    if not text:\\\\\\\\n        return []\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    # 子块：按 child_chunk_size 切，无重叠（或可设子块重叠，这里先不设）\\\\\\\\n    child_spans = _slide_windows(text, child_chunk_size, 0)\\\\\\\\n    if not child_spans:\\\\\\\\n        return [ChunkWithParent(content=text, parent_content=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", chunk_id=f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{doc_id}_0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    step = max(1, parent_ctx_len - parent_overlap)\\\\\\\\n    result: List[ChunkWithParent] = []\\\\\\\\n    for i, (cs, ce) in enumerate(child_spans):\\\\\\\\n        child_content = text[cs:ce]\\\\\\\\n        # 父块：以当前子块为中心，向前取 parent_ctx_len，与前一父块重叠 parent_overlap\\\\\\\\n        parent_start = max(0, cs - (parent_ctx_len - parent_overlap))\\\\\\\\n        parent_end = min(len(text), parent_start + parent_ctx_len)\\\\\\\\n        parent_content = text[parent_start:parent_end]\\\\\\\\n        result.append(\\\\\\\\n            ChunkWithParent(\\\\\\\\n                content=child_content,\\\\\\\\n                parent_content=parent_content,\\\\\\\\n                chunk_id=f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{doc_id}_{i}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if doc_id else str(i),\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n    return result\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef chunk_text_multi_size(\\\\\\\\n    full_text: str,\\\\\\\\n    chunk_sizes: Tuple[int, ...] = DEFAULT_CHUNK_SIZES,\\\\\\\\n    parent_overlap: int = DEFAULT_PARENT_OVERLAP,\\\\\\\\n    parent_ctx_len: Optional[int] = None,\\\\\\\\n    doc_id: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n) -&gt; dict[int, List[ChunkWithParent]]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    用多种切块大小分别切片，便于验证不同 size 的效果。\\\\\\\\n    返回: { chunk_size -&gt; [ChunkWithParent, ...] }\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    out: dict[int, List[ChunkWithParent]] = {}\\\\\\\\n    for size in chunk_sizes:\\\\\\\\n        parent_len = parent_ctx_len or min(size * 2, 768)\\\\\\\\n        out[size] = chunk_text(\\\\\\\\n            full_text,\\\\\\\\n            child_chunk_size=size,\\\\\\\\n            parent_overlap=parent_overlap,\\\\\\\\n            parent_ctx_len=parent_len,\\\\\\\\n            doc_id=f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{doc_id}_s{size}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if doc_id else f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"s{size}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n    return out\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":102,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":3499,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/nanqi/Desktop/常用文件/rag_code_rewritebyai/src/kb/chunking.py\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":102}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"1459dcbb-7471-4959-9301-e584112ccada\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"0276ed0f-14b1-4170-a494-2ccde64b6d52\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\
