src/kb/retrieval_eval.py\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n检索效果评估：匹配度、命中位置、无关信息比例、问题覆盖率等。\\\\\\\\n纯文本与规则计算，不调用任何模型或 OpenAI。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nimport re\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import List, Tuple\\\\\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\nclass RetrievalEvalResult:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"单条检索结果的评估指标。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    match_score: float  # 与问题的匹配度 [0, 1]\\\\\\\\n    match_positions: List[Tuple[int, int]]  # 命中位置 (start, end) 字符偏移\\\\\\\\n    irrelevant_ratio: float  # 无关信息比例 [0, 1]，越高表示无关内容越多\\\\\\\\n    query_coverage: float  # 问题词在文本中的覆盖率 [0, 1]\\\\\\\\n    normalized_score: float  # 综合得分，便于阈值比较\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _normalize_for_match(s: str) -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"去空白、小写，供匹配与位置计算用。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    return re.sub(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s+\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", s.strip().lower())\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _query_terms(query: str) -&gt; List[str]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"简单分词：按字或按词（这里按字+2字词，便于中文）。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    s = _normalize_for_match(query)\\\\\\\\n    if not s:\\\\\\\\n        return []\\\\\\\\n    terms = list(s)\\\\\\\\n    for i in range(len(s) - 1):\\\\\\\\n        terms.append(s[i : i + 2])\\\\\\\\n    return terms\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef compute_match_positions(query: str, text: str) -&gt; List[Tuple[int, int]]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"计算查询词在文本中的出现位置（字符级），去重合并相邻区间。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    if not text:\\\\\\\\n        return []\\\\\\\\n    terms = _query_terms(query)\\\\\\\\n    if not terms:\\\\\\\\n        return []\\\\\\\\n    positions: List[Tuple[int, int]] = []\\\\\\\\n    norm_text = _normalize_for_match(text)\\\\\\\\n    # 在原文中找对应位置（近似：用归一化串找后再映射）\\\\\\\\n    for term in terms:\\\\\\\\n        if len(term) == 0:\\\\\\\\n            continue\\\\\\\\n        start = 0\\\\\\\\n        while True:\\\\\\\\n            idx = norm_text.find(term, start)\\\\\\\\n            if idx == -1:\\\\\\\\n                break\\\\\\\\n            # 映射回大致字符位置（简化：归一化后空格被删，用字符比例近似）\\\\\\\\n            positions.append((idx, idx + len(term)))\\\\\\\\n            start = idx + 1\\\\\\\\n    # 合并重叠区间\\\\\\\\n    if not positions:\\\\\\\\n        return []\\\\\\\\n    positions.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])\\\\\\\\n    merged: List[Tuple[int, int]] = [positions[0]]\\\\\\\\n    for a, b in positions[1:]:\\\\\\\\n        if a &lt;= merged[-1][1]:\\\\\\\\n            merged[-1] = (merged[-1][0], max(merged[-1][1], b))\\\\\\\\n        else:\\\\\\\\n            merged.append((a, b))\\\\\\\\n    return merged\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef compute_irrelevant_ratio(query: str, text: str) -&gt; float:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"无关信息比例：未被查询词覆盖的文本长度占比。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    if not text or not text.strip():\\\\\\\\n        return 1.0\\\\\\\\n    positions = compute_match_positions(query, text)\\\\\\\\n    norm_text = _normalize_for_match(text)\\\\\\\\n    total = len(norm_text)\\\\\\\\n    if total == 0:\\\\\\\\n        return 1.0\\\\\\\\n    covered = 0\\\\\\\\n    for a, b in positions:\\\\\\\\n        covered += min(b, total) - min(a, total)\\\\\\\\n    uncovered = total - min(covered, total)\\\\\\\\n    return min(1.0, max(0.0, uncovered / total))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef compute_query_coverage(query: str, text: str) -&gt; float:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"问题在文本中的覆盖率：有多少查询词在文本中出现。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    q_terms = set(_query_terms(query))\\\\\\\\n    if not q_terms:\\\\\\\\n        return 0.0\\\\\\\\n    norm_text = _normalize_for_match(text)\\\\\\\\n    found = sum(1 for t in q_terms if len(t) &gt; 0 and t in norm_text)\\\\\\\\n    return found / len(q_terms) if q_terms else 0.0\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef compute_match_score(\\\\\\\\n    query: str,\\\\\\\\n    text: str,\\\\\\\\n    *,\\\\\\\\n    coverage_weight: float = 0.5,\\\\\\\\n    density_weight: float = 0.5,\\\\\\\\n) -&gt; float:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    综合匹配度 [0, 1]：\\\\\\\\n    - coverage: 查询词在文本中的覆盖率\\\\\\\\n    - density: 命中区间总长 / 文本长度，越高表示越相关\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    if not text or not text.strip():\\\\\\\\n        return 0.0\\\\\\\\n    coverage = compute_query_coverage(query, text)\\\\\\\\n    positions = compute_match_positions(query, text)\\\\\\\\n    norm_text = _normalize_for_match(text)\\\\\\\\n    total_len = len(norm_text)\\\\\\\\n    if total_len == 0:\\\\\\\\n        return 0.0\\\\\\\\n    matched_len = sum(max(0, min(b, total_len) - min(a, total_len)) for a, b in positions)\\\\\\\\n    density = min(1.0, matched_len / total_len)\\\\\\\\n    score = coverage_weight * coverage + density_weight * density\\\\\\\\n    return min(1.0, max(0.0, score))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef evaluate_retrieval(query: str, text: str) -&gt; RetrievalEvalResult:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"计算单条检索文本的完整评估指标。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    match_score = compute_match_score(query, text)\\\\\\\\n    positions = compute_match_positions(query, text)\\\\\\\\n    irrelevant_ratio = compute_irrelevant_ratio(query, text)\\\\\\\\n    query_coverage = compute_query_coverage(query, text)\\\\\\\\n    # 综合得分：匹配度为主，无关比例惩罚\\\\\\\\n    normalized_score = match_score * (1.0 - 0.5 * irrelevant_ratio)\\\\\\\\n    return RetrievalEvalResult(\\\\\\\\n        match_score=match_score,\\\\\\\\n        match_positions=positions,\\\\\\\\n        irrelevant_ratio=irrelevant_ratio,\\\\\\\\n        query_coverage=query_coverage,\\\\\\\\n        normalized_score=normalized_score,\\\\\\\\n    )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":138}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/nanqi/Desktop/常用文件/rag_code_rewritebyai/src/kb/retrieval_eval.py\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# src/kb/retrieval_eval.py\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n检索效果评估：匹配度、命中位置、无关信息比例、问题覆盖率等。\\\\\\\\n纯文本与规则计算，不调用任何模型或 OpenAI。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nimport re\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import List, Tuple\\\\\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\nclass RetrievalEvalResult:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"单条检索结果的评估指标。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    match_score: float  # 与问题的匹配度 [0, 1]\\\\\\\\n    match_positions: List[Tuple[int, int]]  # 命中位置 (start, end) 字符偏移\\\\\\\\n    irrelevant_ratio: float  # 无关信息比例 [0, 1]，越高表示无关内容越多\\\\\\\\n    query_coverage: float  # 问题词在文本中的覆盖率 [0, 1]\\\\\\\\n    normalized_score: float  # 综合得分，便于阈值比较\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _normalize_for_match(s: str) -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"去空白、小写，供匹配与位置计算用。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    return re.sub(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s+\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", s.strip().lower())\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _query_terms(query: str) -&gt; List[str]:\\\\\\\\n     return []\\\\\\\\n    terms = list(s)\\\\\\\\n    for i in range(len(s) - 1):\\\\\\\\n        terms.append(s[i : i + 2])\\\\\\\\n    return terms\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef compute_match_positions(query: str, text: str) -&gt; List[Tuple[int, int]]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"计算查询词在文本中的出现位置（字符级），去重合并相邻区间。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    if not text:\\\\\\\\n        return []\\\\\\\\n    terms = _query_terms(query)\\\\\\\\n    if not terms:\\\\\\\\n        return []\\\\\\\\n    positions: List[Tuple[int, int]] = []\\\\\\\\n    norm_text = _normalize_for_match(text)\\\\\\\\n    # 在原文中找对应位置（近似：用归一化串找后再映射）\\\\\\\\n    for term in terms:\\\\\\\\n        if len(term) == 0:\\\\\\\\n            continue\\\\\\\\n        start = 0\\\\\\\\n        while True:\\\\\\\\n            idx = norm_text.find(term, start)\\\\\\\\n            if idx == -1:\\\\\\\\n                break\\\\\\\\n            # 映射回大致字符位置（简化：归一化后空格被删，用字符比例近似）\\\\\\\\n            positions.append((idx, idx + len(term)))\\\\\\\\n            start = idx + 1\\\\\\\\n    # 合并重叠区间\\\\\\\\n    if not positions:\\\\\\\\n        return []\\\\\\\\n    positions.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])\\\\\\\\n    merged: List[Tuple[int, int]] = [positions[0]]\\\\\\\\n    for a, b in positions[1:]:\\\\\\\\n        if a &lt;= merged[-1][1]:\\\\\\\\n            merged[-1] = (merged[-1][0], max(merged[-1][1], b))\\\\\\\\n        else:\\\\\\\\n            merged.append((a, b))\\\\\\\\n    return merged\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef compute_irrelevant_ratio(query: str, text: str) -&gt; float:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"无关信息比例：未被查询词覆盖的文本长度占比。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    if not text or not text.strip():\\\\\\\\n        return 1.0\\\\\\\\n    positions = compute_match_positions(query, text)\\\\\\\\n    norm_text = _normalize_for_match(text)\\\\\\\\n    total = len(norm_text)\\\\\\\\n    if total == 0:\\\\\\\\n        return 1.0\\\\\\\\n    covered = 0\\\\\\\\n    for a, b in positions:\\\\\\\\n        covered += min(b, total) - min(a, total)\\\\\\\\n    uncovered = total - min(covered, total)\\\\\\\\n    return min(1.0, max(0.0, uncovered / total))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef compute_query_coverage(query: str, text: str) -&gt; float:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"问题在文本中的覆盖率：有多少查询词在文本中出现。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    q_terms = set(_query_terms(query))\\\\\\\\n    if not q_terms:\\\\\\\\n        return 0.0\\\\\\\\n    norm_text = _normalize_for_match(text)\\\\\\\\n    found = sum(1 for t in q_terms if len(t) &gt; 0 and t in norm_text)\\\\\\\\n    return found / len(q_terms) if q_terms else 0.0\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef compute_match_score(\\\\\\\\n    query: str,\\\\\\\\n    text: str,\\\\\\\\n    *,\\\\\\\\n    coverage_weight: float = 0.5,\\\\\\\\n    density_weight: float = 0.5,\\\\\\\\n) -&gt; float:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    综合匹配度 [0, 1]：\\\\\\\\n    - coverage: 查询词在文本中的覆盖率\\\\\\\\n    - density: 命中区间总长 / 文本长度，越高表示越相关\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    if not text or not text.strip():\\\\\\\\n        return 0.0\\\\\\\\n    coverage = compute_query_coverage(query, text)\\\\\\\\n    positions = compute_match_positions(query, text)\\\\\\\\n    norm_text = _normalize_for_match(text)\\\\\\\\n    total_len = len(norm_text)\\\\\\\\n    if total_len == 0:\\\\\\\\n        return 0.0\\\\\\\\n    matched_len = sum(max(0, min(b, total_len) - min(a, total_len)) for a, b in positions)\\\\\\\\n    density = min(1.0, matched_len / total_len)\\\\\\\\n    score = coverage_weight * coverage + density_weight * density\\\\\\\\n    return min(1.0, max(0.0, score))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef evaluate_retrieval(query: str, text: str) -&gt; RetrievalEvalResult:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"计算单条检索文本的完整评估指标。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    match_score = compute_match_score(query, text)\\\\\\\\n    positions = compute_match_positions(query, text)\\\\\\\\n    irrelevant_ratio = compute_irrelevant_ratio(query, text)\\\\\\\\n    query_coverage = compute_query_coverage(query, text)\\\\\\\\n    # 综合得分：匹配度为主，无关比例惩罚\\\\\\\\n    normalized_score = match_score * (1.0 - 0.5 * irrelevant_ratio)\\\\\\\\n    return RetrievalEvalResult(\\\\\\\\n name=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"viewport\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" content=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" /&gt;\\\\\\\\n  &lt;title&gt;知识库智能体&lt;/title&gt;\\\\\\\\n  &lt;style&gt;\\\\\\\\n    * { box-sizing: border-box; }\\\\\\\\n    body { font-family: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"PingFang SC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Microsoft YaHei\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", sans-serif; margin: 0; background: #f7f8fa; color: #222; }\\\\\\\\n    h1 { font-size: 1.25rem; margin-top: 0; }\\\\\\\\n    section { margin-bottom: 2rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .app-shell { display: flex; min-height: 100vh; }\\\\\\\\n    .sidebar { width: 280px; border-right: 1px solid #e5e7eb; background: #fff; padding: 1rem; overflow-y: auto; }\\\\\\\\n    .main-panel { flex: 1; padding: 1rem 1.25rem; max-width: calc(100vw - 280px); }\\\\\\\\n    .conversation-search { width: 100%; margin-top: 0.75rem; padding: 0.55rem 0.65rem; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius: 8px; }\\\\\\\\n    .conversation-list { margin-top: 0.75rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .conversation-item { width: 100%; text-align: left; padding: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 8px; background: #fff; cursor: pointer; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .conversation-item.active { border-color: #06c; background: #eef6ff; }\\\\\\\\n    .conversation-row { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 0.5rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .conversation-meta { min-width: 0; flex: 1; }\\\\\\\\n    .conversation-title { font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 600; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }\\\\\\\\n    .conversation-time { font-size: 0.8rem; color: #666; margin-top: 0.25rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .conversation-actions { display: flex; gap: 0.25rem; flex-shrink: 0; }\\\\\\\\n    .conversation-actions button { border: none; background: transparent; color: #666; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.85rem; padding: 0.1rem 0.2rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .conversation-actions button:hover { color: #111; }\\\\\\\\n    .conversation-actions button.delete:hover { color: #c62828; }\\\\\\\\n    .empty-conversations { color: #666; font-size: 0.9rem; padding: 0.75rem 0.25rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .upload-box { border: 2px dashed #ccc; padding: 1.5rem; text-align: center; border-radius: 8px; }\\\\\\\\n    .upload-box input { display: none; }\\\\\\\\n    .upload-box label { cursor: pointer; color: #06c; }\\\\\\\\n    .parse-result { background: #f5f5f5; padding: 1rem; border-radius: 8px; max-height: 300px; overflow: auto; white-space: pre-wrap; font-size: 0.9rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .chat-box { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-top: 0.5rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .chat-box input { flex: 1; padding: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 6px; }\\\\\\\\n    .chat-box button { padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background: #06c; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; }\\\\\\\\n    .messages { margin-top: 1rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .msg { padding: 0.75rem; border-radius: 8px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; max-width: 85%; }\\\\\\\\n    .msg.user { background: #e3f2fd; margin-left: 0; }\\\\\\\\n    .msg.assistant { background: #f5f5f5; margin-left: auto; }\\\\\\\\n    .msg-content { white-space: pre-wrap; }\\\\\\\\n    .msg-actions { margin-top: 0.5rem; display: flex; gap: 0.4rem; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; }\\\\\\\\n    .feedback-btn { border: 1px solid #d1d5db; background: #fff; color: #333; border-radius: 999px; padding: 0.2rem 0.65rem; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.82rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .feedback-btn.active { background: #0b57d0; border-color: #0b57d0; color: #fff; }\\\\\\\\n    .feedback-status { font-size: 0.8rem; color: #666; }\\\\\\\\n    .analytics-panel { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 12px; padding: 1rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .analytics-summary { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap: 0.75rem; margin-top: 0.75rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .analytics-card { border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 10px; padding: 0.75rem; background: #fafafa; }\\\\\\\\n    .analytics-card strong { display: block; font-size: 1.2rem; margin-top: 0.25rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .analytics-list { margin-top: 1rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .analytics-list h3 { margin-bottom: 0.4rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .analytics-list ul { padding-left: 1rem; margin: 0; }\\\\\\\\n    .analytics-list li { margin-bottom: 0.4rem; line-height: 1.5; }\\\\\\\\n    .ops-summary { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr)); gap: 0.75rem; margin-top: 0.75rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .ops-card { border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 10px; padding: 0.75rem; background: #fafafa; }\\\\\\\\n    .ops-card .label { font-size: 0.85rem; color: #666; }\\\\\\\\n    .ops-card .value { margin-top: 0.3rem; font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 600; word-break: break-word; }\\\\\\\\n    .ops-card.ok { border-color: #b7dfc2; background: #f2fbf5; }\\\\\\\\n    .ops-card.warn { border-color: #f2d184; background: #fff9eb; }\\\\\\\\n    .ops-card.bad { border-color: #efb5b5; background: #fff3f3; }\\\\\\\\n    .confirm-upload { margin-top: 0.5rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .confirm-upload button { padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background: #2e7d32; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; }\\\\\\\\n    .error { color: #c62828; font-size: 0.9rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .schema-section { margin-top: 1rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .schema-table { border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; margin-bottom: 1rem; overflow: hidden; }\\\\\\\\n    .schema-table h3 { margin: 0; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background: #eee; font-size: 1rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .schema-table table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; }\\\\\\\\n    .schema-table th, .schema-table td { padding: 0.4rem 0.6rem; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; }\\\\\\\\n    .schema-table input { width: 100%; padding: 0.25rem; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px; }\\\\\\\\n    .schema-table input[readonly] { background: #f9f9f9; }\\\\\\\\n    .relations-table input { min-width: 80px; }\\\\\\\\n    .btn-small { padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; font-size: 0.85rem; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid #ccc; background: #fff; }\\\\\\\\n    .btn-small.del { color: #c62828; }\\\\\\\\n    .schema-actions { margin-top: 0.5rem; }\\\\\\\\n  &lt;/style&gt;\\\\\\\\n&lt;/head&gt;\\\\\\\\n&lt;body&gt;\\\\\\\\n  &lt;div class=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"app-shell\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n    &lt;aside class=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sidebar\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n      &lt;h1&gt;知识库智能体&lt;/h1&gt;\\\\\\\\n      &lt;button type=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"button\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" id=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"clearChat\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" class=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"btn-small\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;+ 新建对话&lt;/button&gt;\\\\\\\\n      &lt;input type=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" id=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"conversationSearch\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" class=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"conversation-search\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" placeholder=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"搜索会话标题\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" /&gt;\\\\\\\\n      &lt;div id=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"conversationList\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" class=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"conversation-list\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n    &lt;/aside&gt;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    &lt;main class=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"main-panel\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n      &lt;section&gt;\\\\\\\\n        &lt;h2&gt;Text2SQL 表结构审核&lt;/h2&gt;\\\\\\\\n        &lt;p&gt;展示数据库检测到的库表与字段，可修改表含义、字段含义；表间关联由人工整理后提交，将仅以此喂给大模型。&lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\n        &lt;button type=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"button\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" id=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"schemaLoadBtn\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;加载表结构&lt;/button&gt;\\\\\\\\n        &lt;div id=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"schemaStatus\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" class=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"analytics-panel\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n          &lt;div style=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"display:flex; gap:0.5rem; align-items:center; flex-wrap:wrap;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n            &lt;button type=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"button\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" id=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"loadAnalyticsBtn\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" class=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"btn-small\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;刷新分析面板&lt;/button&gt;\\\\\\\\n            &lt;input type=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"number\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" id=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"analyticsDays\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" class=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"conversation-search\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" style=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"max-width:160px; margin-top:0;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" min=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" value=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"7\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" placeholder=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"统计天数\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" /&gt;\\\\\\\\n          &lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n          &lt;div id=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"analyticsStatus\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" class=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"error\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" style=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"display:none;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n        &lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n      &lt;/section&gt;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      &lt;section&gt;\\\\\\\\n align-items:center; flex-wrap:wrap;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n            &lt;button type=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"button\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" id=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"loadOpsStatusBtn\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" class=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"btn-small\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;刷新运行状态&lt;/button&gt;\\\\\\\\n          &lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n          &lt;div id=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"opsStatus\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" class=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"error\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" style=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"margin-top:0.5rem;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n          &lt;div id=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"opsContent\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" style=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"display:none;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n        &lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n      &lt;/section&gt;\\\\\\\\n    &lt;/main&gt;\\\\\\\\n  &lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  &lt;script&gt;\\\\\\\\n    const API = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"http://localhost:8000\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n    const CONVERSATION_ID_KEY = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"kb_agent_conversation_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n    const OPS_AUTO_REFRESH_MS = 10000;\\\\\\\\n    let currentTaskId = null;\\\\\\\\n    let conversationId = localStorage.getItem(CONVERSATION_ID_KEY) || null;  // 同会话复用，实现多轮与隔离\\\\\\\\n    let conversations = [];\\\\\\\\n    let conversationSearch = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n    let opsAutoRefreshTimer = null;\\\\\\\\n    const FEEDBACK_TAG_OPTIONS = [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"答非所问\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"证据不充分\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"像在猜\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"政策理解有误\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"没有解决问题\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"希望转人工\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    document.getElementById(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"file\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").addEventListener(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"change\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", async (e) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      const file = e.target.files?.[0];\\\\\\\\n      if (!file) return;\\\\\\\\n      const status = document.getElementById(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"uploadStatus\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n      const parseResult = document.getElementById(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"parseResult\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n      const confirmArea = document.getElementById(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"confirmArea\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n      status.textContent = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"上传中…\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n      parseResult.style.display = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"none\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n      confirmArea.style.display = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"none\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n      const fd = new FormData();\\\\\\\\n      fd.append(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"file\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", file);\\\\\\\\n      try {\\\\\\\\n        const r = await fetch(API + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/doc/upload\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", { method: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"POST\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", body: fd });\\\\\\\\n        const data = await r.json();\\\\\\\\n        if (!r.ok) throw new Error(data.detail || \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"上传失败\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n        currentTaskId = data.task_id;\\\\\\\\n        parseResult.textContent = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"原文摘要:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + (data.full_text || \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").slice(0, 2000) + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n解析分段数: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + (data.chunks?.length || 0);\\\\\\\\n        parseResult.style.display = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"block\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n        confirmArea.style.display = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"block\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n        status.textContent = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"解析完成，请对比后确认上传。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n      } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n        status.textContent = err.message || \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"上传失败\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    document.getElementById(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"confirmBtn\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").addEventListener(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"click\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", async () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      if (!currentTaskId) return;\\\\\\\\n      try {\\\\\\\\n        const r = await fetch(API + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/doc/confirm_upload\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {\\\\\\\\n          method: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"POST\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n          headers: { \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Content-Type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"application/json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" },\\\\\\\\n          body: JSON.stringify({ task_id: currentTaskId }),\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n        const data = await r.json();\\\\\\\\n        if (!r.ok) throw new Error(data.detail || \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"上传失败\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n        document.getElementById(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"uploadStatus\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").textContent = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"已上传 \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + (data.uploaded || 0) + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" 条到 Milvus。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n      } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n        document.getElementById(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"uploadStatus\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").textContent = err.message || \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"确认上传失败\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    function addMsg(role, text, options = {}) {\\\\\\\\n      const div = document.createElement(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"div\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n      div.className = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"msg \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + role;\\\\\\\\n      const content = document.createElement(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"div\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n      content.className = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"msg-content\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n      content.textContent = text;\\\\\\\\n      div.appendChild(content);\\\\\\\\n      if (role === \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"assistant\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" &amp;&amp; options.observationId) {\\\\\\\\n        div.appendChild(createFeedbackControls({\\\\\\\\n          observationId: options.observationId,\\\\\\\\n          feedbackRating: options.feedbackRating || \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n          feedbackTags: options.feedbackTags || [],\\\\\\\\n          feedbackText: options.feedbackText || \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        }));\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      document.getElementById(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"messages\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").appendChild(div);\\\\\\\\n      div.scrollIntoView({ behavior: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"smooth\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", block: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"end\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" });\\\\\\\\n      return div;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    function createFeedbackControls(options = {}) {\\\\\\\\n      const wrap = document.createElement(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"div\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n      wrap.className = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"msg-actions\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n      const observationId = options.observationId;\\\\\\\\n      const currentRating = options.feedbackRating || \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n      const currentTags = options.feedbackTags || [];\\\\\\\\n      const currentText = options.feedbackText || \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      const upBtn = document.createElement(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"button\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n      upBtn.type = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"button\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n      upBtn.className = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"feedback-btn\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + (currentRating === \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"up\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" ? \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" active\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" : \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n      upBtn.textContent = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"👍 有帮助\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n      upBtn.addEventListener(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"click\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", async () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        await submitFeedback({ observationId, rating: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"up\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", tags: [], freeText: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" });\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n      wrap.appendChild(upBtn);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      const downBtn = document.createElement(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"button\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n      downBtn.type = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"button\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n      downBtn.className = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"feedback-btn\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + (currentRating === \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"down\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" ? \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" active\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" : \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n      downBtn.textContent = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"👎 需改进\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n      downBtn.addEventListener(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"click\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", async () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        const defaultTagText = currentTags.length ? currentTags.join(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"、\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") : FEEDBACK_TAG_OPTIONS.join(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"、\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n        const tagInput = window.prompt(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"请输入反馈标签，可填写多个，使用逗号分隔。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n建议标签：\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + defaultTagText, currentTags.join(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"));\\\\\\\\n        if (tagInput == null) return;\\\\\\\\n        const textInput = window.prompt(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"可补充说明问题点（选填）\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", currentText || \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n        if (textInput == null) return;\\\\\\\\n        const tags = tagInput.split(/[，,]/).map(s =&gt; s.trim()).filter(Boolean);\\\\\\\\n        await submitFeedback({ observationId, rating: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"down\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", tags, freeText: (textInput || \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").trim() });\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n      wrap.appendChild(downBtn);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      const status = document.createElement(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"span\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n      status.className = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"feedback-status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n      status.textContent = currentRating === \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"up\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        ? \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"已点赞\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        : currentRating === \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"down\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n          ? (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"已反馈\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + (currentTags.length ? \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"：\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + currentTags.join(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"、\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") : \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\n          : \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"可对这条回答做反馈\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n      wrap.appendChild(status);\\\\\\\\n      return wrap;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    async function submitFeedback({ observationId, rating, tags, freeText }) {\\\\\\\\n      if (!conversationId || !observationId) return;\\\\\\\\n      try {\\\\\\\\n        const r = await fetch(API + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/qa/feedback\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {\\\\\\\\n          method: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"POST\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n          headers: { \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Content-Type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"application/json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" },\\\\\\\\n          body: JSON.stringify({\\\\\\\\n            observation_id: observationId,\\\\\\\\n            conversation_id: conversationId,\\\\\\\\n            rating,\\\\\\\\n            tags: tags || [],\\\\\\\\n            free_text: freeText || \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n          }),\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n        const data = await r.json();\\\\\\\\n        if (!r.ok) throw new Error(data.detail || \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"提交反馈失败\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n        await loadConversationHistory();\\\\\\\\n        await loadQaAnalytics();\\\\\\\\n      } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n        window.alert(err.message || \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"提交反馈失败\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n name=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"viewport\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" content=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" /&gt;\\\\\\\\n  &lt;title&gt;知识库智能体&lt;/title&gt;\\\\\\\\n  &lt;style&gt;\\\\\\\\n    * { box-sizing: border-box; }\\\\\\\\n    body { font-family: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"PingFang SC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Microsoft YaHei\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", sans-serif; margin: 0; background: #f7f8fa; color: #222; }\\\\\\\\n    h1 { font-size: 1.25rem; margin-top: 0; }\\\\\\\\n    section { margin-bottom: 2rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .app-shell { display: flex; min-height: 100vh; }\\\\\\\\n    .sidebar { width: 280px; border-right: 1px solid #e5e7eb; background: #fff; padding: 1rem; overflow-y: auto; }\\\\\\\\n    .main-panel { flex: 1; padding: 1rem 1.25rem; max-width: calc(100vw - 280px); }\\\\\\\\n    .conversation-search { width: 100%; margin-top: 0.75rem; padding: 0.55rem 0.65rem; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius: 8px; }\\\\\\\\n    .conversation-list { margin-top: 0.75rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .conversation-item { width: 100%; text-align: left; padding: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 8px; background: #fff; cursor: pointer; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .conversation-item.active { border-color: #06c; background: #eef6ff; }\\\\\\\\n    .conversation-row { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 0.5rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .conversation-meta { min-width: 0; flex: 1; }\\\\\\\\n    .conversation-title { font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 600; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }\\\\\\\\n    .conversation-time { font-size: 0.8rem; color: #666; margin-top: 0.25rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .conversation-actions { display: flex; gap: 0.25rem; flex-shrink: 0; }\\\\\\\\n    .conversation-actions button { border: none; background: transparent; color: #666; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.85rem; padding: 0.1rem 0.2rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .conversation-actions button:hover { color: #111; }\\\\\\\\n    .conversation-actions button.delete:hover { color: #c62828; }\\\\\\\\n    .empty-conversations { color: #666; font-size: 0.9rem; padding: 0.75rem 0.25rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .upload-box { border: 2px dashed #ccc; padding: 1.5rem; text-align: center; border-radius: 8px; }\\\\\\\\n    .upload-box input { display: none; }\\\\\\\\n    .upload-box label { cursor: pointer; color: #06c; }\\\\\\\\n    .parse-result { background: #f5f5f5; padding: 1rem; border-radius: 8px; max-height: 300px; overflow: auto; white-space: pre-wrap; font-size: 0.9rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .chat-box { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-top: 0.5rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .chat-box input { flex: 1; padding: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 6px; }\\\\\\\\n    .chat-box button { padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background: #06c; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; }\\\\\\\\n    .messages { margin-top: 1rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .msg { padding: 0.75rem; border-radius: 8px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; max-width: 85%; }\\\\\\\\n    .msg.user { background: #e3f2fd; margin-left: 0; }\\\\\\\\n    .msg.assistant { background: #f5f5f5; margin-left: auto; }\\\\\\\\n    .msg-content { white-space: pre-wrap; }\\\\\\\\n    .msg-actions { margin-top: 0.5rem; display: flex; gap: 0.4rem; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; }\\\\\\\\n    .feedback-btn { border: 1px solid #d1d5db; background: #fff; color: #333; border-radius: 999px; padding: 0.2rem 0.65rem; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.82rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .feedback-btn.active { background: #0b57d0; border-color: #0b57d0; color: #fff; }\\\\\\\\n    .feedback-status { font-size: 0.8rem; color: #666; }\\\\\\\\n    .analytics-panel { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 12px; padding: 1rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .analytics-summary { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap: 0.75rem; margin-top: 0.75rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .analytics-card { border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 10px; padding: 0.75rem; background: #fafafa; }\\\\\\\\n    .analytics-card strong { display: block; font-size: 1.2rem; margin-top: 0.25rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .analytics-list { margin-top: 1rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .analytics-list h3 { margin-bottom: 0.4rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .analytics-list ul { padding-left: 1rem; margin: 0; }\\\\\\\\n    .analytics-list li { margin-bottom: 0.4rem; line-height: 1.5; }\\\\\\\\n    .ops-summary { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr)); gap: 0.75rem; margin-top: 0.75rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .ops-card { border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 10px; padding: 0.75rem; background: #fafafa; }\\\\\\\\n    .ops-card .label { font-size: 0.85rem; color: #666; }\\\\\\\\n    .ops-card .value { margin-top: 0.3rem; font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 600; word-break: break-word; }\\\\\\\\n    .ops-card.ok { border-color: #b7dfc2; background: #f2fbf5; }\\\\\\\\n    .ops-card.warn { border-color: #f2d184; background: #fff9eb; }\\\\\\\\n    .ops-card.bad { border-color: #efb5b5; background: #fff3f3; }\\\\\\\\n    .confirm-upload { margin-top: 0.5rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .confirm-upload button { padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background: #2e7d32; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; }\\\\\\\\n    .error { color: #c62828; font-size: 0.9rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .schema-section { margin-top: 1rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .schema-table { border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; margin-bottom: 1rem; overflow: hidden; }\\\\\\\\n    .schema-table h3 { margin: 0; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background: #eee; font-size: 1rem; }\\\\\\\\n    .schema-table table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; }\\\\\\\\n    .schema-table th, .schema-table td { padding: 0.4rem 0.6rem; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; }\\\\\\\\n    .schema-table input { width: 100%; padding: 0.25rem; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px; }\\\\\\\\n    .schema-table input[readonly] { background: #f9f9f9; }\\\\\\\\n    .relations-table input { min-width: 80px; }\\\\\\\\n    .btn-small { padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; font-size: 0.85rem; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid #ccc; background: select_prompt_templates(question: str, max_templates: int = 3) -&gt; List[PromptScenario]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"按关键词命中数选出最相关的场景模板，最多返回 max_templates 个。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    q = (question or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").lower().strip()\\\\\\\\n    if not q:\\\\\\\\n        return []\\\\\\\\n    scored: List[tuple[int, int, PromptScenario]] = []\\\\\\\\n    for idx, template in enumerate(SCENARIO_PROMPT_TEMPLATES):\\\\\\\\n        hits = sum(1 for keyword in template.keywords if keyword and keyword.lower() in q)\\\\\\\\n        if hits &gt; 0:\\\\\\\\n            scored.append((hits, -idx, template))\\\\\\\\n    scored.sort(reverse=True)\\\\\\\\n    return [template for _, _, template in scored[:max_templates]]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef render_prompt_template_guidance(question: str, max_templates: int = 3) -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"将匹配到的场景模板渲染为 Prompt 可直接注入的补充说明。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    selected = select_prompt_templates(question, max_templates=max_templates)\\\\\\\\n    if not selected:\\\\\\\\n        return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"未命中特定海关业务场景模板，请按通用海关政策咨询方式作答：先结论，后依据，结论必须有证据引用。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    lines = [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"本题命中的海关业务场景模板：\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n    for item in selected:\\\\\\\\n        lines.append(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"- {item.name}：{item.guidance}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(lines)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":96}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/nanqi/Desktop/常用文件/rag_code_rewritebyai/src/kb/prompt_templates.py\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n海关业务场景化 Prompt 模板。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n这里维护 40+ 个轻量级场景模板，不直接替代主 Prompt，而是在 RAG 生成前根据问题关键词\\\\\\\\n挑选最相关的 1~3 个模板作为“补充回答约束”，让模型更贴近海关业务表达方式与答题重点。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import List\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\\\\\\\\nclass PromptScenario:\\\\\\\\n select_prompt_templates(question: str, max_templates: int = 3) -&gt; List[PromptScenario]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"按关键词命中数选出最相关的场景模板，最多返回 max_templates 个。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    q = (question or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").lower().strip()\\\\\\\\n    if not q:\\\\\\\\n        return []\\\\\\\\n    scored: List[tuple[int, int, PromptScenario]] = []\\\\\\\\n    for idx, template in enumerate(SCENARIO_PROMPT_TEMPLATES):\\\\\\\\n        hits = sum(1 for keyword in template.keywords if keyword and keyword.lower() in q)\\\\\\\\n        if hits &gt; 0:\\\\\\\\n            scored.append((hits, -idx, template))\\\\\\\\n    scored.sort(reverse=True)\\\\\\\\n    return [template for _, _, template in scored[:max_templates]]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef render_prompt_template_guidance(question: str, max_templates: int = 3) -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n src/llm.py\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n大模型调用统一入口。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n本项目仅使用 DeepSeek（如 DeepSeek R1），禁止调用 OpenAI 自有模型（如 GPT-4）。\\\\\\\\n在单一 API 基础上补充了多 Key/多 endpoint 负载均衡、失败熔断与自动切换：\\\\\\\\n- 默认仍兼容原有 &#96;OPENAI_API_BASE&#96; + &#96;OPENAI_API_KEY&#96; 配置；\\\\\\\\n- 若配置 &#96;DEEPSEEK_API_ENDPOINTS&#96;，则按“权重 + 当前并发负载”优先选择健康节点；\\\\\\\\n- 连续失败达到阈值后暂时熔断，避免把流量持续打到异常节点。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport logging\\\\\\\\nimport threading\\\\\\\\nimport time\\\\\\\\nfrom contextvars import ContextVar\\\\\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Any, AsyncIterator, Iterator, Optional\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom langchain_core.callbacks import AsyncCallbackManagerForLLMRun, CallbackManagerForLLMRun\\\\\\\\nfrom langchain_core.language_models import BaseChatModel\\\\\\\\nfrom langchain_core.outputs import ChatGenerationChunk, ChatResult\\\\\\\\nfrom pydantic import ConfigDict, PrivateAttr\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom config import get_settings\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\\\\\\\\n_LAST_ENDPOINT_NAME: ContextVar[str] = ContextVar(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"deepseek_last_endpoint_name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", default=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _is_retryable_error(exc: Exception) -&gt; bool:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"识别适合切换到其它节点重试的错误：超时、连接错误、429 与 5xx。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    status_code = str(getattr(exc, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    msg = (str(exc) or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").lower()\\\\\\\\n    retryable_keywords = (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"timeout\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"timed out\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"connection\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"temporarily\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"rate limit\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"429\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    if any(keyword in msg for keyword in retryable_keywords):\\\\\\\\n        return True\\\\\\\\n    return status_code.startswith(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"5\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or status_code == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"429\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\nclass _EndpointConfig:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"单个 DeepSeek 接入点配置。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    base_url: str\\\\\\\\n    api_key: str\\\\\\\\n    weight: int = 1\\\\\\\\n    name: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\nclass _EndpointState:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"运行期节点状态：用于负载均衡与熔断。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    config: _EndpointConfig\\\\\\\\n    failures: int = 0\\\\\\\\n    opened_until: float = 0.0\\\\\\\\n    inflight: int = 0\\\\\\\\n    clients: dict[tuple[str, float], Any] = field(default_factory=dict)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _parse_deepseek_endpoints() -&gt; list[_EndpointConfig]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    解析 DeepSeek endpoint 配置。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    支持两种方式：\\\\\\\\n    1. 兼容旧配置：&#96;OPENAI_API_BASE&#96; + &#96;OPENAI_API_KEY&#96;\\\\\\\\n    2. 多节点配置：&#96;DEEPSEEK_API_ENDPOINTS&#96;\\\\\\\\n       格式：&#96;base_url|api_key|weight|name&#96;，多项用逗号或换行分隔\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    s = get_settings()\\\\\\\\n    raw = (getattr(s, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"deepseek_api_endpoints\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip()\\\\\\\\n    endpoints: list[_EndpointConfig] = []\\\\\\\\n    if raw:\\\\\\\\n        entries = [item.strip() for item in raw.replace(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").split(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") if item.strip()]\\\\\\\\n        for idx, item in enumerate(entries, 1):\\\\\\\\n            parts = [part.strip() for part in item.split(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"|\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")]\\\\\\\\n            if len(parts) &lt; 2 or not parts[0] or not parts[1]:\\\\\\\\n                continue\\\\\\\\n            base_url = parts[0]\\\\\\\\n            api_key = parts[1]\\\\\\\\n            weight_text = parts[2] if len(parts) &gt;= 3 and parts[2] else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            name = parts[3] if len(parts) &gt;= 4 and parts[3] else f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"deepseek-{idx}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            try:\\\\\\\\n                weight = max(1, int(weight_text))\\\\\\\\n            except Exception:\\\\\\\\n                weight = 1\\\\\\\\n            endpoints.append(_EndpointConfig(base_url=base_url, api_key=api_key, weight=weight, name=name))\\\\\\\\n    if endpoints:\\\\\\\\n        return endpoints\\\\\\\\n    return [\\\\\\\\n        _EndpointConfig(\\\\\\\\n            base_url=s.openai_api_base,\\\\\\\\n            api_key=s.openai_api_key,\\\\\\\\n            weight=1,\\\\\\\\n            name=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"deepseek-default\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n    ]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass _DeepSeekEndpointPool:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"进程内共享的 DeepSeek 节点池。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self):\\\\\\\\n        s = get_settings()\\\\\\\\n        self._states = [_EndpointState(config=item) for item in _parse_deepseek_endpoints()]\\\\\\\\n        self._failure_threshold = max(1, int(getattr(s, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"deepseek_circuit_breaker_failures\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", 3)))\\\\\\\\n        self._open_seconds = max(5, int(getattr(s, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"deepseek_circuit_breaker_open_seconds\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", 30)))\\\\\\\\n        self._timeout_seconds = max(1, int(getattr(s, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"agent_request_timeout_seconds\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", 120)))\\\\\\\\n        self._lock = threading.Lock()\\\\\\\\n        self._round_robin_cursor = 0\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _healthy_states_locked(self) -&gt; list[_EndpointState]:\\\\\\\\n        now = time.time()\\\\\\\\n        healthy = [state for state in self._states if state.opened_until &lt;= now]\\\\\\\\n        if healthy:\\\\\\\\n            return healthy\\\\\\\\n        if not self._states:\\\\\\\\n            return []\\\\\\\\n        # 所有节点都熔断时，放行“最早到期”的 1 个节点进入半开状态做探测。\\\\\\\\n        return [min(self._states, key=lambda state: state.opened_until)]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    @staticmethod\\\\\\\\n    def _weighted_load_score(state: _EndpointState) -&gt; float:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        计算节点当前负载分数，分数越小越应优先被选择。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        这里用 &#96;inflight / weight&#96; 近似表达：\\\\\\\\n        - inflight 越低，说明当前并发越小；\\\\\\\\n        - weight 越高，说明该节点理论承载能力越强；\\\\\\\\n        因此高权重节点在相同并发下会得到更低分，更容易继续接流量。\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        return state.inflight / max(1, state.config.weight)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def ordered_candidates(self) -&gt; list[_EndpointState]:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        返回本次调用的候选节点顺序：优先选择「加权后当前负载更低」的健康节点。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        排序规则：\\\\\\\\n        1. &#96;inflight / weight&#96; 越小越优先，兼顾并发与权重；\\\\\\\\n        2. 若分数相同，则按轮询游标打散，避免长期固定命中同一节点；\\\\\\\\n        3. 若仍相同，则失败次数更少的优先。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        注意：同一次调用里每个节点最多尝试一次。\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        with self._lock:\\\\\\\\n            healthy = self._healthy_states_locked()\\\\\\\\n            if not healthy:\\\\\\\\n                return []\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            start = self._round_robin_cursor % len(healthy)\\\\\\\\n            self._round_robin_cursor += 1\\\\\\\\n            rotated = healthy[start:] + healthy[:start]\\\\\\\\n            rotate_rank = {id(state): idx for idx, state in enumerate(rotated)}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            return sorted(\\\\\\\\n                healthy,\\\\\\\\n                key=lambda state: (\\\\\\\\n                    self._weighted_load_score(state),\\\\\\\\n                    rotate_rank[id(state)],\\\\\\\\n                    state.failures,\\\\\\\\n                ),\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def status_snapshot(self) -&gt; list[dict[str, Any]]:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"导出当前 endpoint 状态快照，供日志与外部观测接口使用。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        with self._lock:\\\\\\\\n            now = time.time()\\\\\\\\n            snapshot: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\\\\\\\\n            for state in self._states:\\\\\\\\n                seconds_until_retry = max(0.0, state.opened_until - now)\\\\\\\\n                snapshot.append({\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": state.config.name or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"base_url\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": state.config.base_url,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"weight\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": state.config.weight,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"inflight\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": state.inflight,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"failures\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": state.failures,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"circuit_open\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": state.opened_until &gt; now,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"seconds_until_retry\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": round(seconds_until_retry, 3),\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"model_client_count\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": len(state.clients),\\\\\\\\n                })\\\\\\\\n            return snapshot\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def acquire(self, state: _EndpointState) -&gt; None:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"标记节点正在处理请求。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        with self._lock:\\\\\\\\n            state.inflight += 1\\\\\\\\n            current_inflight = state.inflight\\\\\\\\n            weight = state.config.weight\\\\\\\\n            failures = state.failures\\\\\\\\n        logger.info(\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"LLM endpoint selected: name=%s inflight=%s weight=%s weighted_load=%.3f failures=%s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            state.config.name or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            current_inflight,\\\\\\\\n            weight,\\\\\\\\n            current_inflight / max(1, weight),\\\\\\\\n            failures,\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def release_success(self, state: _EndpointState) -&gt; None:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"请求成功：关闭熔断并清空连续失败计数。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        with self._lock:\\\\\\\\n            was_open = state.opened_until &gt; time.time()\\\\\\\\n            state.inflight = max(0, state.inflight - 1)\\\\\\\\n            state.failures = 0\\\\\\\\n            state.opened_until = 0.0\\\\\\\\n            current_inflight = state.inflight\\\\\\\\n        logger.info(\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"LLM endpoint success: name=%s inflight=%s circuit_recovered=%s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            state.config.name or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            current_inflight,\\\\\\\\n            was_open,\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def release_failure(self, state: _EndpointState, exc: Exception) -&gt; None:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"请求失败：若为可切换错误则累计失败并触发熔断。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        with self._lock:\\\\\\\\n            state.inflight = max(0, state.inflight - 1)\\\\\\\\n            if not _is_retryable_error(exc):\\\\\\\\n                current_inflight = state.inflight\\\\\\\\n                error_text = str(exc)\\\\\\\\n                endpoint_name = state.config.name or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                logger.warning(\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"LLM endpoint non-retryable failure: name=%s inflight=%s error=%s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                    endpoint_name,\\\\\\\\n                    current_inflight,\\\\\\\\n                    error_text,\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n                return\\\\\\\\n            state.failures += 1\\\\\\\\n            current_inflight = state.inflight\\\\\\\\n            failures = state.failures\\\\\\\\n            threshold = self._failure_threshold\\\\\\\\n            error_text = str(exc)\\\\\\\\n            if state.failures &gt;= self._failure_threshold:\\\\\\\\n                state.opened_until = time.time() + self._open_seconds\\\\\\\\n                seconds_until_retry = round(max(0.0, state.opened_until - time.time()), 3)\\\\\\\\n                endpoint_name = state.config.name or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                logger.warning(\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"LLM endpoint circuit opened: name=%s inflight=%s failures=%s threshold=%s retry_after_seconds=%s error=%s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                    endpoint_name,\\\\\\\\n                    current_inflight,\\\\\\\\n                    failures,\\\\\\\\n                    threshold,\\\\\\\\n                    seconds_until_retry,\\\\\\\\n                    error_text,\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n                return\\\\\\\\n        logger.warning(\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"LLM endpoint retryable failure: name=%s inflight=%s failures=%s threshold=%s error=%s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            state.config.name or src/llm.py\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n大模型调用统一入口。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n本项目仅使用 DeepSeek（如 DeepSeek R1），禁止调用 OpenAI 自有模型（如 GPT-4）。\\\\\\\\n在单一 API 基础上补充了多 Key/多 endpoint 负载均衡、失败熔断与自动切换：\\\\\\\\n- 默认仍兼容原有 &#96;OPENAI_API_BASE&#96; + &#96;OPENAI_API_KEY&#96; 配置；\\\\\\\\n- 若配置 &#96;DEEPSEEK_API_ENDPOINTS&#96;，则按“权重 + 当前并发负载”优先选择健康节点；\\\\\\\\n- 连续失败达到阈值后暂时熔断，避免把流量持续打到异常节点。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport logging\\\\\\\\nimport threading\\\\\\\\nimport time\\\\\\\\nfrom contextvars import ContextVar\\\\\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Any, AsyncIterator, Iterator, Optional\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom langchain_core.callbacks import AsyncCallbackManagerForLLMRun, CallbackManagerForLLMRun\\\\\\\\nfrom langchain_core.language_models import BaseChatModel\\\\\\\\nfrom langchain_core.outputs import ChatGenerationChunk, ChatResult\\\\\\\\nfrom pydantic import ConfigDict, PrivateAttr\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom config import get_settings\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\\\\\\\\n_LAST_ENDPOINT_NAME: ContextVar[str] = ContextVar(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"deepseek_last_endpoint_name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", default=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _is_retryable_error(exc: Exception) -&gt; bool:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"识别适合切换到其它节点重试的错误：超时、连接错误、429 与 5xx。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    status_code = str(getattr(exc, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    msg = (str(exc) or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").lower()\\\\\\\\n    retryable_keywords = (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"timeout\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"timed out\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"connection\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"temporarily\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"rate limit\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"429\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    if any(keyword in msg for keyword in retryable_keywords):\\\\\\\\n        return True\\\\\\\\n    return status_code.startswith(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"5\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or status_code == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"429\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\nclass _EndpointConfig:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"单个 DeepSeek 接入点配置。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    base_url: str\\\\\\\\n    api_key: str\\\\\\\\n    weight: int = 1\\\\\\\\n    name: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\nclass _EndpointState:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"运行期节点状态：用于负载均衡与熔断。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    config: _EndpointConfig\\\\\\\\n    failures: int = 0\\\\\\\\n    opened_until: float = 0.0\\\\\\\\n    inflight: int = 0\\\\\\\\n    clients: dict[tuple[str, float], Any] = field(default_factory=dict)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _parse_deepseek_endpoints() -&gt; list[_EndpointConfig]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    解析 DeepSeek endpoint 配置。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    支持两种方式：\\\\\\\\n    1. 兼容旧配置：&#96;OPENAI_API_BASE&#96; + &#96;OPENAI_API_KEY&#96;\\\\\\\\n    2. 多节点配置：&#96;DEEPSEEK_API_ENDPOINTS&#96;\\\\\\\\n       格式：&#96;base_url|api_key|weight|name&#96;，多项用逗号或换行分隔\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    s = get_settings()\\\\\\\\n    raw = (getattr(s, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"deepseek_api_endpoints\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip()\\\\\\\\n    endpoints: list[_EndpointConfig] = []\\\\\\\\n    if raw:\\\\\\\\n        entries = [item.strip() for item in raw.replace(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").split(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") if item.strip()]\\\\\\\\n        for idx, item in enumerate(entries, 1):\\\\\\\\n            parts = [part.strip() for part in item.split(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"|\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")]\\\\\\\\n            if len(parts) &lt; 2 or not parts[0] or not parts[1]:\\\\\\\\n                continue\\\\\\\\n            base_url = parts[0]\\\\\\\\n            api_key = parts[1]\\\\\\\\n            weight_text = parts[2] if len(parts) &gt;= 3 and parts[2] else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            name = parts[3] if len(parts) &gt;= 4 and parts[3] else f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"deepseek-{idx}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            try:\\\\\\\\n                weight = max(1, int(weight_text))\\\\\\\\n            except Exception:\\\\\\\\n                weight = 1\\\\\\\\n            endpoints.append(_EndpointConfig(base_url=base_url, api_key=api_key, weight=weight, name=name))\\\\\\\\n    if endpoints:\\\\\\\\n        return endpoints\\\\\\\\n    return [\\\\\\\\n        _EndpointConfig(\\\\\\\\n            base_url=s.openai_api_base,\\\\\\\\n            api_key=s.openai_api_key,\\\\\\\\n            weight=1,\\\\\\\\n            name=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"deepseek-default\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n    ]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass _DeepSeekEndpointPool:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"进程内共享的 DeepSeek 节点池。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self):\\\\\\\\n        s = get_settings()\\\\\\\\n        self._states = [_EndpointState(config=item) for item in _parse_deepseek_endpoints()]\\\\\\\\n        self._failure_threshold = max(1, int(getattr(s, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"deepseek_circuit_breaker_failures\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", 3)))\\\\\\\\n        self._open_seconds = max(5, int(getattr(s, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"deepseek_circuit_breaker_open_seconds\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", 30)))\\\\\\\\n        self._timeout_seconds = max(1, int(getattr(s, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"agent_request_timeout_seconds\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", 120)))\\\\\\\\n        self._lock = threading.Lock()\\\\\\\\n        self._round_robin_cursor = 0\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def _healthy_states_locked(self) -&gt; list[_EndpointState]:\\\\\\\\n        now = time.time()\\\\\\\\n        healthy = [state for state in self._states if state.opened_until &lt;= now]\\\\\\\\n        if healthy:\\\\\\\\n            return healthy\\\\\\\\n        if not self._states:\\\\\\\\n            return []\\\\\\\\n        # 所有节点都熔断时，放行“最早到期”的 1 个节点进入半开状态做探测。\\\\\\\\n        return [min(self._states, key=lambda state: state.opened_until)]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    @staticmethod\\\\\\\\n    def _weighted_load_score(state: _EndpointState) -&gt; float:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        计算节点当前负载分数，分数越小越应优先被选择。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        这里用 &#96;inflight / weight&#96; 近似表达：\\\\\\\\n        - inflight 越低，说明当前并发越小；\\\\\\\\n        - weight 越高，说明该节点理论承载能力越强；\\\\\\\\n        因此高权重节点在相同并发下会得到更低分，更容易继续接流量。\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        return state.inflight / max(1, state.config.weight)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def ordered_candidates(self) -&gt; list[_EndpointState]:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        返回本次调用的候选节点顺序：优先选择「加权后当前负载更低」的健康节点。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        排序规则：\\\\\\\\n        1. &#96;inflight / weight&#96; 越小越优先，兼顾并发与权重；\\\\\\\\n        2. 若分数相同，则按轮询游标打散，避免长期固定命中同一节点；\\\\\\\\n        3. 若仍相同，则失败次数更少的优先。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        注意：同一次调用里每个节点最多尝试一次。\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        with self._lock:\\\\\\\\n            healthy = self._healthy_states_locked()\\\\\\\\n            if not healthy:\\\\\\\\n                return []\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            start = self._round_robin_cursor % len(healthy)\\\\\\\\n            self._round_robin_cursor += 1\\\\\\\\n            rotated = healthy[start:] + healthy[:start]\\\\\\\\n            rotate_rank = {id(state): idx for idx, state in enumerate(rotated)}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            return sorted(\\\\\\\\n                healthy,\\\\\\\\n                key=lambda state: (\\\\\\\\n                    self._weighted_load_score(state),\\\\\\\\n                    rotate_rank[id(state)],\\\\\\\\n                    state.failures,\\\\\\\\n                ),\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def status_snapshot(self) -&gt; list[dict[str, Any]]:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"导出当前 endpoint 状态快照，供日志与外部观测接口使用。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        with self._lock:\\\\\\\\n            now = time.time()\\\\\\\\n            snapshot: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\\\\\\\\n            for state in self._states:\\\\\\\\n                seconds_until_retry = max(0.0, state.opened_until - now)\\\\\\\\n                snapshot.append({\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": state.config.name or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"base_url\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": state.config.base_url,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"weight\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": state.config.weight,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"inflight\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": state.inflight,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"failures\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": state.failures,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"circuit_open\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": state.opened_until &gt; now,\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"seconds_until_retry\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": round(seconds_until_retry, 3),\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"model_client_count\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": len(state.clients),\\\\\\\\n                })\\\\\\\\n            return snapshot\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def acquire(self, state: _EndpointState) -&gt; None:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"标记节点正在处理请求。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        with self._lock:\\\\\\\\n            state.inflight += 1\\\\\\\\n            current_inflight = state.inflight\\\\\\\\n            weight = state.config.weight\\\\\\\\n            failures = state.failures\\\\\\\\n        logger.info(\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"LLM endpoint selected: name=%s inflight=%s weight=%s weighted_load=%.3f failures=%s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            state.config.name or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            current_inflight,\\\\\\\\n            weight,\\\\\\\\n            current_inflight / max(1, weight),\\\\\\\\n            failures,\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def release_success(self, state: _EndpointState) -&gt; None:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"请求成功：关闭熔断并清空连续失败计数。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        with self._lock:\\\\\\\\n            was_open = state.opened_until &gt; time.time()\\\\\\\\n            state.inflight = max(0, state.inflight - 1)\\\\\\\\n            state.failures = 0\\\\\\\\n            state.opened_until = 0.0\\\\\\\\n            current_inflight = state.inflight\\\\\\\\n        logger.info(\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"LLM endpoint success: name=%s inflight=%s circuit_recovered=%s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            state.config.name or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            current_inflight,\\\\\\\\n            was_open,\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def release_failure(self, state: _EndpointState, exc: Exception) -&gt; None:\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"请求失败：若为可切换错误则累计失败并触发熔断。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        with self._lock:\\\\\\\\n            state.inflight = max(0, state.inflight - 1)\\\\\\\\n            if not _is_retryable_error(exc):\\\\\\\\n                current_inflight = state.inflight\\\\\\\\n                error_text = str(exc)\\\\\\\\n                endpoint_name = state.config.name or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                logger.warning(\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"LLM endpoint non-retryable failure: name=%s inflight=%s error=%s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                    endpoint_name,\\\\\\\\n                    current_inflight,\\\\\\\\n                    error_text,\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n                return\\\\\\\\n            state.failures += 1\\\\\\\\n            current_inflight = state.inflight\\\\\\\\n            failures = state.failures\\\\\\\\n            threshold = self._failure_threshold\\\\\\\\n            error_text = str(exc)\\\\\\\\n            if state.failures &gt;= self._failure_threshold:\\\\\\\\n                state.opened_until = time.time() + self._open_seconds\\\\\\\\n                seconds_until_retry = round(max(0.0, state.opened_until - time.time()), 3)\\\\\\\\n                endpoint_name = state.config.name or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                logger.warning(\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"LLM endpoint circuit opened: name=%s inflight=%s failures=%s threshold=%s retry_after_seconds=%s error=%s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n                    endpoint_name,\\\\\\\\n                    current_inflight,\\\\\\\\n                    failures,\\\\\\\\n                    threshold,\\\\\\\\n                    seconds_until_retry,\\\\\\\\n                    error_text,\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\n                return\\\\\\\\n        logger.warning(\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"LLM endpoint retryable failure: name=%s inflight=%s failures=%s threshold=%s error=%s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            state.config.name or available\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _normalize_question(question: str) -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"归一化问题：去首尾空白、连续空白折叠为单空格、小写、截断至 _MAX_QUESTION_LEN，用于缓存 key 匹配。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    s = (question or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip()\\\\\\\\n    s = re.sub(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s+\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", s)[:_MAX_QUESTION_LEN]\\\\\\\\n    return s.lower().strip()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef _cache_key(question: str) -&gt; str:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"对归一化后的问题做 SHA256，取前 32 位，加上前缀得到 Redis None。\\\\\\\\n    Redis 不可用时返回 None，不抛错。\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    if not (question or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip():\\\\\\\\n        return 总控/子节点路由下一跳：chat（闲聊）、knowledge（知识库）、human（人工介入）、__end__（结束）\\\\\\\\nNextAction = Literal[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"chat\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"knowledge\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"human\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"__end__\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass AgentState(TypedDict):\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    图状态：\\\\\\\\n    - messages: 对话消息列表，使用 add_messages 做增量合并\\\\\\\\n    - next: 总控/子节点写入的下一节点，供 conditional_edges 路由\\\\\\\\n    - pending_sql: 待人工确认执行的 SQL（仅当知识库返回删除/修改类 SQL 时写入，确认后由 API 执行并清空）\\\\\\\\n    - human_message: 转人工时由上游节点写入的提示文案，人工介入节点会将其作为回复发出\\\\\\\\n    - route: 实际执行的子链路（chat / knowledge / cache / text2sql_confirm add_messages]\\\\\\\\n    next: NextAction\\\\\\\\n    pending_sql: NotRequired[Optional[str]]\\\\\\\\n    human_message: NotRequired[Optional[str]]\\\\\\\\n    route: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    if s in (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"chat\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"knowledge\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"human\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"__end__\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"):\\\\\\\\n        return s\\\\\\\\n    return
